2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cmarkdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003e#\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eCommandment\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eBlue Team Objective\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAll PLCs must have signed project change logs\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEstablish chain-of-custody for logic\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e2\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNever trust OB1 unless you verified its hash\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDetect stealthy logic injection\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e3\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHMI macros should always be reviewed after updates\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCatch hidden persistence or logic bombs\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e4\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEngineer host MACs must be whitelisted\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ePrevent adversary pivot via spoofed host\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e5\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHistorian A\u0026amp;E and PV data must match\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eReveal event manipulation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e6\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAll vendor tools should log actions to SIEM\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEnsure traceability of engineering events\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e7\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSchedule daily scans of ladder logic changes\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCapture unauthorized changes during low-activity hours\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e8\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCorrelate field protocol traffic with shift schedules\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDetect time-anomalous access\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e9\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eFor every firmware upload, log operator and hash\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eMaintain firmware integrity\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e10\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eNever assume OT visibility equals control\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eVisual parity ≠ system integrity\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" EVE-NG\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePLC Emulators: PLCSim, Codesys Runtime, OpenPLC\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eHMI Emulators: FactoryTalk, WinCC, Ignition\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eProtocol Emulation \u0026amp; Fuzzing\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eModbus: ModbusPal, mbLogic, pymodbus\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eS7Comm: snap7, s7server, python-snap7\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eOPC UA: FreeOpcUA, open62541, Prosys UA Sim Server\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eCIP: cpprogtool, pycomm3, cippwn\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePhysical Process Simulation\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eDigital Twins: FactoryIO, Simumatik, Unity 3D\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eControllers: S7-1200 Starter Kit, RPi + OpenPLC\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSensors: Node-RED, Arduino, Python-based emulators\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cmarkdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003ePlatform\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003ePrimary FactoryIO\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eFull control simulation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStuxnet-style centrifuge attacks, valve manipulation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCodesys SoftPLC + ScadaBR\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eProtocol fuzzing\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eMulti-vendor protocol attacks, logic injection\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eModbusPal + mbLogic\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eQuick protocol testing\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRegister manipulation, function code fuzzing\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eUnity Digital Twin + Node-RED\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCyber-physical simulation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ePhysical impact modeling, safety system testing\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSiemens S7-1200 Starter Kit\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eLive payload testing\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eFirmware manipulation, physical I/O attacks\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRockwell visibility\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAlert on logic injection traffic\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSecurityOnion with Modbus parser\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eProtocol misuse detection\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDetect invalid function codes\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTIA Portal + FT AssetCentre\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eReal-time change control\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTrack firmware/logical changes\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eWinCC Audit Mode\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHMI macro misuse\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCorrelate user actions to macro triggers\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eFactoryIO + Suricata\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003ePhysical + digital simulation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAlert on physical state mismatch\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch6 Areas\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e- Covert persistence mechanisms \u003cbr\u003e - Anti-forensics implementation \u003cbr\u003e - False flag operations\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAdvanced Techniques\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e- PLC firmware manipulation \u003cbr\u003e - Historian data poisoning \u003cbr\u003e - Safety system 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cmarkdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eCategory\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eDetails\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAPT Characteristics\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e- Low-and-slow operational tempo \u003cbr\u003e - Multiple persistence layers \u003cbr\u003e - Cross-protocol attack chains\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSuccess Metrics\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e- Long-term undetected access \u003cbr\u003e - Physical process impact capability \u003cbr\u003e - Realistic false positive generation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eStrategic Evolution Principles:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003ePayload rotation between engagements\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eInsider technique incorporation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTool customization for organization specificity\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRealism focus over exploitation complexity\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFinal Operational Wisdom:\u003c/strong\u003e\n\"Red team OT like APTs target IT — be covert, persistent, quiet, and logic-based. The loud scanner-based approaches of traditional pentesting have no place in critical infrastructure assessment. Your success should be measured by what blue teams DON'T find, not by how many vulnerabilities you document.\"\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e11.10 ADVERSARY SIMULATION CALIBRATION \u0026amp; SCORING FRAMEWORK\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-1110-adversary-simulation-calibration--scoring-framework\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 11.10 ADVERSARY SIMULATION CALIBRATION \u0026amp; SCORING FRAMEWORK\" Criteria\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eDescription\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eScoring Range\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eWeight (%)\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eStealth Rating\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHow well the activity avoided detection by monitoring tools or operators\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (noisy) to 5 (undetected)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e25%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eImpact Rating\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDegree of simulated impact on industrial processes (e.g., sabotage realism)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (minimal) to 5 (critical)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e25%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePersistence Rating\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHow long the attacker maintained access before detection/removal\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (short-lived) to 5 (long-term undetected)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e20%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEmulation Accuracy\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHow closely the attack chain mimicked a known APT or real-world threat\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (low fidelity) to 5 (high fidelity)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e15%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSafety Consideration\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDid the red team respect process safety boundaries and simulate safely?\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (unsafe) to 5 (highly safe)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e10%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDetection Coverage\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHow many security systems/telemetry sources detected the activity\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e1 (none) to 5 (all expected systems)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e5%\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eTotal Score (out of 100):\u003c/strong\u003e \u003cem\u003eCalculated by weighted average\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" Technique\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eIDS/IPS Evasion\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eUse protocol padding to bypass signature rules\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eThrottle traffic to mimic normal HMI/PLC polling\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAvoid malformed or suspicious protocol structures\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAlign access/scanning with operator shift hours\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEDR Evasion\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eObfuscate payloads to evade static signature detection\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAvoid \u003ccode\u003e.tmp\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e.bak\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e.log\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e.cache\u003c/code\u003e artifacts\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eInject into memory-resident trusted OT processes\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSpoof legitimate engineering tools/process names\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSIEM Correlation\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStagger event timing to break rule correlations\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eMimic known false positive patterns\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTrigger benign alerts to mask true malicious behavior\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eExploit parsing/normalization blind spots in OT SIEMs\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eForensic Evasion\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eErase memory traces and obfuscate runtime arguments\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eTimestomp modified files and remove recent file artifacts\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRoute traffic through trusted engineering hosts\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSpoof MAC/IP of legitimate vendor devices\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eOperational Tactics\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eDeliver payloads during low-noise hours\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSimulate legitimate user behavior (e.g., alarm acknowledgment, tag updates)\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eUse redundant paths (HMI, PLC, historian) for covert access\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEmulate real engineering workflows to remain stealthy\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eTradecraft Focus Areas:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eProtocol-specific timing matching\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eTraffic blending with operational patterns\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eNetwork anomaly avoidance\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBehavioral pattern emulation\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" scans\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eValidate who made every PLC change, when, and why\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eKnow your protocols well enough to spot subtle         <svg aria-hidden="true" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" version="1.1" width="24" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-mark-github">
    <path d="M12 1C5.923 1 1 5.923 1 12c0 4.867 3.149 8.979 7.521 10.436.55.096.756-.233.756-.522 0-.262-.013-1.128-.013-2.049-2.764.509-3.479-.674-3.699-1.292-.124-.317-.66-1.293-1.127-1.554-.385-.207-.936-.715-.014-.729.866-.014 1.485.797 1.691 1.128.99 1.663 2.571 1.196 3.204.907.096-.715.385-1.196.701-1.471-2.448-.275-5.005-1.224-5.005-5.432 0-1.196.426-2.186 1.128-2.956-.111-.275-.496-1.402.11-2.915 0 0 .921-.288 3.024 1.128a10.193 10.193 0 0 1 2.75-.371c.936 0 1.871.123 2.75.371 2.104-1.43 3.025-1.128 3.025-1.128.605 1.513.221 2.64.111 2.915.701.77 1.127 1.747 1.127 2.956 0 4.222-2.571 5.157-5.019 5.432.399.344.743 1.004.743 2.035 0 1.471-.014 2.654-.014 3.025 0 .289.206.632.756.522C19.851 20.979 23 16.854 23 12c0-6.077-4.922-11-11-11Z"></path>
</svg>
</a>
      <span>
        &copy; 2026 GitHub,&nbsp;Inc.
      </span>
    </div>

    <nav aria-label="Footer">
      <h3 class="sr-only" id="sr-footer-heading">Footer navigation</h3>

      <ul class="list-style-none d-flex flex-justify-center flex-wrap mb-2 mb-lg-0" aria-labelledby="sr-footer-heading">

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to Terms&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:terms&quot;}" href="https://docs.github.com/site-policy/github-terms/github-terms-of-service" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Terms</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to privacy&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:privacy&quot;}" href="https://docs.github.com/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-privacy-statement" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Privacy</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to security&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:security&quot;}" href="https://github.com/security" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Security</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to status&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:status&quot;}" href="https://www.githubstatus.com/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Status</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to community&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:community&quot;}" href="https://github.community/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Community</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to docs&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:docs&quot;}" href="https://docs.github.com/" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Docs</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2">
            <a data-analytics-event="{&quot;category&quot;:&quot;Footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;go to contact&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;text:contact&quot;}" href="https://support.github.com?tags=dotcom-footer" data-view-component="true" class="Link--secondary Link">Contact</a>
          </li>

          <li class="mx-2" >
  <cookie-consent-link>
    <button
      type="button"
      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;cookies&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;cookies_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
       Manage cookies
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

<li class="mx-2">
  <cookie-consent-link>
    <button
      type="button"
      class="Link--secondary underline-on-hover border-0 p-0 color-bg-transparent text-left"
      data-action="click:cookie-consent-link#showConsentManagement"
      data-analytics-event="{&quot;location&quot;:&quot;footer&quot;,&quot;action&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info&quot;,&quot;context&quot;:&quot;subfooter&quot;,&quot;tag&quot;:&quot;link&quot;,&quot;label&quot;:&quot;dont_share_info_link_subfooter_footer&quot;}"
    >
      Do not share my personal information
    </button>
  </cookie-consent-link>
</li>

      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</footer>



    <ghcc-consent id="ghcc" class="position-fixed bottom-0 left-0" style="z-index: 999999"
      data-locale="en"
      data-initial-cookie-consent-allowed=""
      data-cookie-consent-required="false"
    ></ghcc-consent>




  <div id="ajax-error-message" class="ajax-error-message flash flash-error" hidden>
    <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-alert">
    <path d="M6.457 1.047c.659-1.234 2.427-1.234 3.086 0l6.082 11.378A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.082 15H1.918a1.75 1.75 0 0 1-1.543-2.575Zm1.763.707a.25.25 0 0 0-.44 0L1.698 13.132a.25.25 0 0 0 .22.368h12.164a.25.25 0 0 0 .22-.368Zm.53 3.996v2.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.5 0v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0ZM9 11a1 1 0 1 1-2 0 1 1 0 0 1 2 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    <button type="button" class="flash-close js-ajax-error-dismiss" aria-label="Dismiss error">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
    </button>
    You can’t perform that action at this time.
  </div>

    <template id="site-details-dialog">
  <details class="details-reset details-overlay details-overlay-dark lh-default color-fg-default hx_rsm" open>
    <summary role="button" aria-label="Close dialog"></summary>
    <details-dialog class="Box Box--overlay d-flex flex-column anim-fade-in fast hx_rsm-dialog hx_rsm-modal">
      <button class="Box-btn-octicon m-0 btn-octicon position-absolute right-0 top-0" type="button" aria-label="Close dialog" data-close-dialog>
        <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-x">
    <path d="M3.72 3.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0L8 6.94l3.22-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.275.326.749.749 0 0 1-.215.734L9.06 8l3.22 3.22a.749.749 0 0 1-.326 1.275.749.749 0 0 1-.734-.215L8 9.06l-3.22 3.22a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042L6.94 8 3.72 4.78a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.06Z"></path>
</svg>
      </button>
      <div class="octocat-spinner tmp-my-6 js-details-dialog-spinner"></div>
    </details-dialog>
  </details>
</template>

    <div class="Popover js-hovercard-content position-absolute" style="display: none; outline: none;">
  <div class="Popover-message Popover-message--bottom-left Popover-message--large Box color-shadow-large" style="width:360px;">
  </div>
</div>

    <template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon m-2">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none m-2">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>
<template id="snippet-clipboard-copy-button-unpositioned">
  <div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">
    <path d="M0 6.75C0 5.784.784 5 1.75 5h1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-1.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-1.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v1.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 9.25 16h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 0 14.25Z"></path><path d="M5 1.75C5 .784 5.784 0 6.75 0h7.5C15.216 0 16 .784 16 1.75v7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 14.25 11h-7.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 5 9.25Zm1.75-.25a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v7.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h7.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-7.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25-.25Z"></path>
</svg>
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-check js-clipboard-check-icon color-fg-success d-none">
    <path d="M13.78 4.22a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-7.25 7.25a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0L2.22 9.28a.751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018L6 10.94l6.72-6.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06 0Z"></path>
</svg>
    </clipboard-copy>
  </div>
</template>




    </div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true" ></div>
    <div id="js-global-screen-reader-notice-assertive" class="sr-only mt-n1" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true"></div>
  </body>
</html>
